name: Hot Swap

Switching to this weapon while you are damaged strongly increases its handling for a short duration.

Swords gain increased charge speed, guard resistance, and guard endurance instead.

name: Reciprocity

name: Heavy Hunter Armor

name: Conducting Prime Recon

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

Deal increased weapon damage to Scorn. 

Wearing Shadestalker Armor (currently {var:1903370001} of 4) increases the bonus damage.

Dark Ether Reaper origin trait has a chance to spawn an extra Dark Ether charge.

Weapons with the Dark Ether Reaper origin trait are overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Light Reactor

name: Perpetual Motion

name: Crucible Pink

name: Mobius Conduit

name: Snapshot Sights

description: Greatly increases ready and stow speed for Pulse Rifles.

name: Psychohack

Sustained damage from this weapon exhausts the target for a short duration.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Spark of Discipline
description: Spark of Discipline

name: The Perfect Fifth

name: Enhanced Unflinching Auto Rifle Aim

name: Arc Aligned—Rank 4

description: By aligning with the Festival Flame, you do a ludicrous amount of damage with Arc power.

description: By aligning with the Festival Flame, you do a lot more damage with Arc power.

description: By aligning with the Festival Flame, you do significantly more damage with Arc power.

name: Heating Up

description: Fires lacerating Weakening rounds.

name: Unplanned Reprieve

description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Bows.

name: Aggressive Frame

description: +10 Health ▲

description: Black Armory weapon final blows briefly grant significantly more ammo generation, reload speed, and damage against combatants when the weapon is redrawn. Buff potency and duration significantly increases for each equipped Black Armory weapon.

name: Green Beam
description: Adds a green beam to your transmat effects.

name: The Game is Afoot!
description: Follow the clue trail and see where it leads.

Grenades recharge faster when using a Solar subclass.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

description: Kills provide improved handling for all weapons for a short duration.

description: Increases the Weapons stat.

Weapon adapts to targets. When dealing damage:

• To weak targets: shots explode
• To strong targets: targets become exhausted
• To Guardians: the weapon's flinch resistance increases

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Aggressive Glaive
description: [Aim Down Sights]  : Raise shield

Final blows with this weapon periodically spawn Dark Ether charges at a faster rate.

Charges can be detonated early with weapons fire or by coming into contact with them. Doing so refills this weapon from reserves.

Activating your class ability or landing precision hits grants you and nearby allies increased reload speed and Weapons stat for a short duration. Stacks ten times.

Final blows while at ten stacks cure you.

Your Glacier, Duskfield, Coldsnap, and Shatter grenades have enhanced functionality.

Glacier Grenade: Adds a [Stasis] Stasis crystal and changes the formation.

Duskfield Grenade: Increases slow-field size and creates a small [Stasis] Stasis crystal on impact.

Coldsnap Grenade: Seekers duplicate after freezing a target and create a [Stasis] Stasis crystal on detonation.

Shatter Grenade: Creates additional shrapnel projectiles on detonation. Hitting frozen targets with this grenade refunds some grenade energy.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

You have an additional grenade charge.

Your Grappling Hook creates a Grapple Tangle at the grapple point.

name: Ensemble
description: Substantially improved handling and reload speed when allies are nearby.

description: The armor energy costs of all armor mods affecting your Arc weapons are significantly discounted.

name: Ember of Tempering
description:
Solar weapon final blows grant you and your allies increased health for a short duration. Stacks 3 times.

While Ember of Tempering is active, your weapons have increased airborne effectiveness, and your Solar weapon final blows create a Firesprite.

name: Cataclysm
description: Nova Bomb travels slowly and seeks enemies. Detonations shatter into smaller seeker projectiles. Fire your weapon at the Nova Bomb to detonate it early.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: Reduces recoil for the equipped Kinetic weapon.

name: Enhanced Nightmare Banisher
description: Grants additional damage to your Super against Nightmare Hunt bosses. This benefit does not stack with other mods that provide the same or greater benefit.

name: Supreme Nightmare Banisher
description: Grants additional damage to your Super against Nightmare Hunt bosses. This benefit does not stack with other mods that provide the same or greater benefit.

name: Stasis Weapon Surge
description: Your Stasis weapons gain a small bonus to damage while you have any Armor Charge. Your Armor Charge now decays over time.

name: Unflinching Bow Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Bows.

name: Elemental Light
description: Defeating a combatant with your Super spawns an elemental well that matches your subclass energy type.

name: Nanotech Tracer Missiles
description: Landing multiple hits turns your next shot into a homing micro-missile.

name: Once activated, walk into the portal on the Relocator Pad to teleport to the Exit Pad.
description: Once activated, walk into the portal on the Relocator Pad to teleport to the Exit Pad.

name: Reflex Action
description: Swapping to a Heat weapon, Submachine Gun, or Hand Cannon grants a short period of increased handling and accuracy. This effect is extended by dealing damage with that weapon.

name: Hotshot
description: Dealing final blows while Reflex Action is active grants a bonus to weapon stat and increases stability, reload, and aim assist for Heat weapons, Submachine Guns, and Hand Cannons for a moderate duration.

name: Well-Rounded
description:
Throwing a grenade or hitting a target with a charged melee grants a stacking bonus to weapon stability, handling, and range.

Using a Super grants maximum stacks.

name: Under-Over
description: Deals bonus damage to targets with overshields. Deals a small amount of bonus damage to combatant shields.

name: Halberdier's Reach

name: Impact Absorber

name: Artifice Armor

name: Dragonfly Spec
description: Increases the radius and damage of Dragonfly.

name: Expanding Abyss
description: Void sources deal increased damage to weakened targets.

name: Argent Blade

name: Shock and Awe
description: When you have an Arc or Prismatic subclass equipped, Arc final blows while you are amplified summon a burst of lightning that damages and jolts targets.

name: Sniper's Meditation

name: Transference

Gain increased grenade and melee damage while transcendent.

Weapon final blows while transcendent refund Light and Dark energy after Transcendence ends.

name: Shieldcrush
description:
While you have Woven Mail, Frost Armor, or a Void Overshield, your melee recharges faster and deals increased damage.

While you are amplified or radiant, your grenade recharges faster and deals increased damage.

name: Sympathetic Arsenal
description: Reloading a short time after a final blow also reloads stowed weapons.

name: Pumpkin Bomb
description: Adds a pumpkin appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Bipod
description: Increases ammo and reserves but reduces damage, blast radius, and reload speed.

name: Grenade Launcher Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Grenade Launchers.

name: Bitterspite
description:
While this weapon is equipped, taking damage accelerates its next reload.

Taking more damage increases the effect.

name: Starlight Beam
description: Fires a stable beam of pure Arc energy.

name: End of the Rainbow
description: Adds a rainbow appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Threat Detector
description: Increased reload, stability, and handling when enemies are in close proximity.

name: Wild Card
description: Final blows with this weapon have a chance to create experimental submunitions at the target's location.

name: Honed Edge
description: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Consume the magazine and load a more powerful round.

name: Lightweight Frame
description: Recurve. Charge quick, move fast.

name: Elemental Capacitor
description:
Substantially increases stats based on the currently equipped Super.
• [Solar] increases your reload speed.
• [Arc] increases handling.
• [Void] increases stability.
• [Stasis] moderately controls recoil and increases movement speed when aiming down sights.
• [Strand] increases airborne effectiveness.

name: Invigoration
description: Reduces melee cooldown each time you pick up an Orb of Power.

name: Machine Gun Loader
description: Increases the reload speed of Machine Guns.

name: Horde Shuttle
description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a threadling.

name: tier5_mod3
description: tier5_mod3

name: Hail The Storm
description:
Shattering frozen targets and Stasis crystals deals increased damage.

Shattering Stasis crystals releases shards of ice that damage and slow targets.

name: tier5_mod5
description: Firing a Rocket Launcher consumes one stack of Armor Charge, granting increased damage and reload speed until you reload or stow your Rocket Launcher.

name: tier5_mod4
description: tier5_mod4

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Enhanced Sidearm Dexterity
description: Greatly increases ready and stow speed for Sidearms.

name: Disruption Break
description: Breaking a combatant's shield with this weapon makes them more vulnerable to Kinetic damage for an improved duration.

name: Causality Quiver
description:
Perfectly drawn arrows that detonate Sacred Flames increase arrow damage.

Striking targets unaffected by Sacred Flame instead refreshes Causality Arrows' duration.

name: Titan Resource Detector
description: Detect resources within a 30-meter range while on the moon Titan.

name: On the Prowl
description:
Periodically marks a nearby combatant as a priority target for you and your team. Entering invisibility immediately marks a target.

Defeating priority targets creates a weakening cloud of smoke that makes you and allies invisible when passing through it. 

When priority targets are defeated, you and nearby allies gain increased weapon reload speed and stability for a short duration and are granted grenade, melee, and class ability energy.

name: Grenade Kickstart
description: When your grenade energy is fully expended, your Armor Charge is consumed and you gain grenade energy for each Armor Charge used.

name: Proximity Ward
description: Gain a powerful overshield while performing your finisher.

name: Enhanced Small Arms Loader
description: Greatly increases reload speed of Hand Cannons, Sidearms, Submachine Guns, and Bows.

name: Green Dawning Lantern
description: Adds a green Dawning lantern to your transmat effects.

name: Edge
description: Greatly increases charge rate and guard resistance.

name: Whisper of Rending
description: Primary ammo weapons do increased damage to [Stasis] Stasis crystals and frozen targets.

name: Whisper of Conduction
description: Nearby [Stasis] Stasis shards track to your position.

name: Whisper of Rime
description: Your Frost Armor has increased duration and maximum stack count.

name: Whisper of Hunger
description: Increases the melee energy gained from picking up [Stasis] Stasis shards.

name: Splintered Gladius
description:
Defeating Cabal Centurions grants Gunsmith Materials.

Mod does not stack.

name: Psychohack
description:
Sustained damage from this weapon exhausts the target for an improved duration.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Aggressive Frame
description: High damage, high recoil.

name: Scorn Slayer
description: Grants additional rewards when you're defeating Scorn.

name: Vanguard Valiant
description: Grants a chance to receive an extra Vanguard token whenever you get one.

name: Collective Action
description:
Collecting an Elemental pickup or destroying a Tangle grants this weapon a stacking period of increased damage. Throwing a Tangle provides additional time.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

name: Mercury Scout Reports
description: Highlights nearby loot caches on Mercury for you and your fireteam.

name: Duelist's Trance
description: Sword final blows grant increased charge rate and defense until this weapon is stowed.

name: Adaptive Munitions
description: This weapon adapts its damage output and effectiveness against energy shields that don't match the weapon's damage type.

name: Color Variants
description: This transmat effect may be awarded in pink or purple color variants.

name: Radar Booster
description: Slightly increases the range at which radar detects enemies.

name: Vestian Ward
description: Spending a Defiant Key at the end of a Season of Defiance Battleground in which you received Favors of Grace, Justice, and Zeal will award an additional Defiant Engram and War Table reputation.

name: Taking Flight
description: This visual effect is suppressed while in combat.

name: Ember of Eruption
description: Your Solar ignitions have increased area of effect.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Sprint Grip
description: Greatly increases the weapon's ready speed and aim down sights speed temporarily after sprinting.

name: Dynamic Charge
description: Final blows and precision hits build up Dynamic Charge. Swapping to Arc Seeker mode increases damage and partially reloads the magazine based on the number of charges. Charged Arc Seeker hits grant, and can spend, Bolt Charge.

name: Deprecated Perk

description: Grants access to armor mods in your helmet that combine the effects of the Strand Siphon mod with the Solar Siphon and Void Siphon mods.

name: Tithe Collector's Sigil
description:
Defeating Cabal combatants grants a small amount of Glimmer.

Mod does not stack.

name: Arc Impact Accelerator
description:
Arc melee abilities recharge faster.

name: Pinpoint Slug Frame
description: Fires a single slug round.

name: Drengr's Lash
description:
Activate your Barricade ability to create a ripple in reality that travels forward along the ground, suspending and damaging the targets it hits.

Final blows on targets affected by Suspend, Unravel, or Sever grant class ability energy.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

name: UNLOCKED BY QUEST
description:
ASPECT OF INFLUENCE
Purchase this Stasis Aspect from the Exo Stranger on Europa after completing the Beyond Light campaign.

name: Graceful Impala

name: Taken Spec

name: Ember of Ashes

name: Elemental Capacitor
description:
Increased stats based on the currently equipped Super.
• [Solar] increases your reload speed.
• [Arc] increases handling.
• [Void] increases stability.
• [Stasis] moderately controls recoil and increases movement speed when aiming down sights.
• [Strand] increases airborne effectiveness.

name: Bones Akimbo

name: Deprecated Perk

Cast your Super to grant Overshield to nearby allies. 

Casting your Barricade grants Overshield to yourself and nearby allies and empowers it, enabling it to slowly regenerate the Overshield of allies bunkering behind it and extend their Overshield duration.

name: Enhanced Sidearm Loader

Heavy attack deploys a shockwave uppercut and launches the user into the air.
An immediate follow-up swing after the uppercut deploys a homing strike that aggressively seeks a target.

When you are at reduced health, this weapon deals additional damage.

name: Compounding Force
description: Fires slugs that cause massive damage to combatant shields. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Mindspun Invocation
description:
Your grapple, Shackle Grenade, Threadling Grenade, and Slicewire Grenade have enhanced functionality.

Your grapple melee spawns three Threadlings.

[Grenade]  : Hold to consume your Shackle Grenade and activate Weaver's Trance. Final blows while Weaver's Trance is active create a suspending detonation.

[Grenade]  : Hold to charge your Threadling Grenade, causing it to weave a Threadling Nest at the impact location that repeatedly spawns Threadlings. 

[Grenade]  : Hold to charge your Slicewire Grenade. The grenade's final detonation will launch submunitions and leave a Tangle in its wake.

name: Focused Fire
description: After a final blow with this weapon, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to return ammo to the magazine and swap to a tighter spread that deals increased damage.

name: Trickle Charge

Sunspots apply scorch and deal damage to targets inside. Entering a Sunspot applies restoration.

name: Dragon's Vengeance

Active only in Guardian Games Rushdown activities. This buff will expire on weekly reset.

Ionic Sentry damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

description: [Shoot] : Stun nearby combatants with Arc energy; also affects some objects.

Well-rounded.

While you're on the Leviathan, activating a Void Super recharges your grenade.

description: +20 Class ▲

Strong against [Disruption]  Overload Champions  and [Stagger]  Unstoppable Champions.

While in the weave, your melee energy is drained and you generate perched Threadlings over time. Threadling hits generate ability energy.

While amplified, the shield blocks significantly more damage before breaking.

name: Disruption Break

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

name: Anticipation

Storm Grenade: After detonating, creates a roaming thundercloud that tracks nearby targets and fires bolts of lightning at foes beneath it.

Solar Grenade: Increases linger duration. Periodically emits blobs of lava around its perimeter.

Nova Bomb travels slowly and seeks targets. Detonations shatter into smaller seeker projectiles.

 [Super]  while active to deactivate your Super early, saving Super energy.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

description: Grants weapon shield-piercing, bypassing combatant defenses. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Gold Contender's Boon

This buff commemorates a Gold Tier score in the Guardian Games Rushdown activity on Expert mode.

Weapons and abilities empower each other. Defeating combatants with abilities grants increased weapon damage. Defeating combatants with weapons grants increased ability recharge speed.

Empowerment stacks 5 times.

While at maximum empowerment, defeat combatants to gain a boost to mobility, accuracy, handling, and reload.

Active only in Guardian Games Rushdown activities. This buff will expire on weekly reset.

name: Glaive Reserves

name: Rewind Rounds
description: When this weapon's magazine is empty, it more effectively refills from reserves based on the number of hits.

name: Breach Refractor
description: Grants grenade energy on final blows with shield-piercing weapons or when a member of your fireteam shuts down a Barrier Champion's ability.

name: Winter's Wrath
description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis staff. While your Super is active:

[Super Primary]  : Cast out a barrage of [Stasis] Stasis shards that freeze targets.

[Super Secondary]  : Cast out a shockwave that shatters all frozen targets.

name: Heavy Warlock Armor
description: Improved resilience.

name: Golden Tricorn Enhanced
description: Final blows with this weapon grant bonus damage for an improved duration. While this buff is active, grenade or melee final blows of the same damage type greatly increase its damage for an improved duration.

name: Stat Penalty
description: -10 Intellect

name: Darkblade Effects
description: Adds Hive Knight miasma to your transmat effects.

name: Eldritch Effects
description: Adds eldritch energy to your transmat effects.

name: Minotaur Effects
description: Adds Vex Minotaur data to your transmat effects.

name: Loot Chest Effects
description: Adds the illusion of a treasure chest to your transmat effects.

name: Tiger Effects
description: Adds the illusion of a tiger to your transmat effects.

name: Archer's Gambit
description: Hipfire precision hits grant a massive draw speed bonus for an improved duration. Further precision hits extend the duration.

name: Thread of Evolution
description: Threadlings travel farther and deal additional damage.

name: Well-Rested
description:
XP gains increased by 2x for your first {var:429946734} Rewards Pass ranks this week.

XP is primarily earned from completing Orders, finishing Ops, and defeating combatants.

name: Returner's Boon
description:
You will earn increased XP while Returner's Boon is active.

Fireteam members who do not have the Boon will be granted the Returner's Blessing buff.

name: Modularity
description: Achieving victory in ritual activities grants a chance to award an Upgrade Module.

name: Trace Rifle Reserves

name: Ember of Searing

description: Acquired armor pieces with randomized stats are more likely to drop with the Skirmisher archetype, which has Melee as its primary stat and Weapons as its secondary.

name: Call to Arms
description: XP gains have increased.

name: Tear
description: Precision final blows cause nearby targets to become severed.

name: Weapons Mod
description: Increases the Weapons stat.

name: Increased Mobility
description: +20 Mobility

name: Vermin
description: Reloading immediately after a kill grants a brief period of invisibility.

name: Treasure Hunter
description: Detects caches within a 50-meter range and increases Glimmer gain.

name: Semi-Auto Striker
description: If you have fewer than 2 stacks of Armor Charge, rapid precision shots with Bows, Snipers, and Scout Rifles generate an Armor Charge.

name: Refreshing Pickups
description: Picking up a Tangle or Elemental Orb grants energy to your least-powered ability.

name: Communal Pickups
description: When an ally destroys or picks up your Tangle or Elemental Orb, the Tangle cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds and you gain bonus damage with weapons matching your subclass for 10 seconds.

name: Elemental Fury
description: While stunned, Champions take bonus damage from your abilities and Elemental Orb damage.

name: Overload Machine Guns
description:
Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Machine Gun stuns unshielded combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Enhanced Sniper Rifle Targeting
description: Greatly improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Sniper Rifles.

name: Stylostixis
description: Arcane Needle causes suspending detonations.

name: Finest Matterweave
description:
Defeated bosses have a chance of dropping an Enhancement Core.

Effect lasts until an Enhancement Core is found. Only one Finest Matterweave can be active at a time.

name: Benevolent Overflow
description: While Engulfed in Light, dying or having the Chalice of Light taken from you creates a burst of healing around you. Multiple copies of this mod stack to increase the radius and potency of healing.

name: Lead from Gold
description: Picking up Heavy ammo also grants ammo to this weapon.

name: Fistfuls of Bullets
description: Melee kills overload the magazine to double its capacity.

name: Facet of Command
description:
Freezing or suppressing a target reloads your equipped weapons and increases weapon stability, aim assist, and airborne effectiveness.

Defeating frozen or suppressed targets creates a Stasis Shard or Void Breach.

name: Rasputin's Arsenal
description: Breaking a target's shield partially reloads this weapon's magazine an improved amount.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Transcendent Moment
description: Final blows grant bonus stats based on the weapon's damage type alignment. Light elements grant stability and handling. Dark elements grant range and aim assist. While Transcendent, this weapon gets both bonuses.

name: Precision Slug
description: Single-slug precision round.

name: Piercing Bowstring
description:
Bows gain shield-piercing arrows, which bypass combatant defenses.

Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Wealth
description: Increased reputation from match wins on a ticket.

name: Prize Pursuant
description: Detects caches within a 30-meter range.

name: Loot Seeker
description: Detects caches within a 20-meter range.

name: Treasure Hunter
description: Detects caches within a 50-meter range.

name: Cache Finder
description: Detects caches within a 40-meter range.

name: Expert Tracker
description: Detects caches within a 75-meter range.

name: Full Court
description: Increases detonation damage as the projectile travels further before exploding.

name: Spirit of the Necrotic
description: Melee hits inflict potent corruption.

name: Spirit of Osmiomancy
description: Improves grenades.

name: Spirit of Harmony

name: Spirit of the Stag
description: Rifts provides damage reduction.

name: Spirit of Starfire
description: Empowered weapon damage recharges grenades.

name: Spirit of Apotheosis

name: Spirit of Vesper

name: Spirit of the Swarm

name: Spirit of the Claw

name: Harsh Refraction

name: Gold from Lead
description: Picking up Special ammo has the chance to grant Heavy ammo.

name: Horde Shuttle

name: No Bell

name: Flashover

name: Dreadful Finisher
description: Defeating powerful combatants with your finisher spawns Special ammo for you and your allies; defeated Subjugators, Tormentors, or Champions spawn more ammo.

Solar and Stasis grenades disrupt combatants, stunning them, delaying ability regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Additionally, Submachine Guns are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Unstoppable Pulse Rifle
description: Aiming down the sights of a Pulse Rifle for a short time loads a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions. Additionally, Pulse Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

description: The armor energy costs of all armor mods affecting your melee are significantly discounted.

name: Authorized Mods: Grenades
description: The armor energy costs of all armor mods affecting your grenades are significantly discounted.

name: Anti-Barrier Shotgun
description: Shotguns you are wielding fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. Additionally, Shotguns are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Overload Breechloaded Grenade Launcher
description: Damaging a combatant with Primary or Special ammo Grenade Launchers disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Additionally, Primary and Special ammo Grenade Launchers are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Echo of Undermining

name: Missile Tracers
description: Land multiple hits to fire homing micro-missiles.

name: Refined Soul

name: Conduction Tines

name: Cerebral Uplink

description: Void kills increase ability regen.

description: Adds a Vex storm appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Suspending Blast
description: Detonating a large number of rounds embedded in a single target suspends them.

name: Chain Reaction
description: Each final blow with this weapon creates an improved elemental damage explosion.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: Adds a Vex Glass appearance to your transmat effects.

description: Adds a Harpy appearance to your transmat effects.

description: Fires high-damage Arc blast.

description: Laser overpenetrates and refracts.

description: Adds a silver beam to your transmat effects.

name: Overload Pulse Rifle
description: Sustained fire from Pulse Rifles disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Additionally, Pulse Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

description: Sustained fire from Auto Rifles disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Additionally, Auto Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Amplified Shielding

name: Counter Charge

name: Cryoclasm

description: Destroying a Stasis crystal or defeating a frozen target with this weapon grants you an improved amount of Frost Armor.

name: Destabilizers
description: [Brake]  : Use while airborne to release roll stabilizers, and move [Movement] to roll.

name: Quick Access Sling
description: Increases this weapon's ready and stow speed.

name: Grenade Launcher Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Grenade Launcher ammo you can carry.

name: Spark of Recovery
description: Spark of Recovery

name: Origin Perk Specialization II
description: Weapons with the Head Rush, Nanotech Tracer Rockets, Unsated Hunger, and Cursed Thrall Origin Traits are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Thanatotic Tangles
description: Strand weapon final blows have a chance to generate a Tangle.

name: Elemental Orbs: Solar
description: While using a Solar subclass, Solar weapon final blows have a chance to spawn a Solar Elemental Orb. Solar Orbs can be thrown to create a Solar explosion that scorches targets it damages.

name: Elemental Orbs: Arc
description: While using an Arc subclass, Arc weapon final blows have a chance to spawn an Arc Elemental Orb. Arc Orbs can be thrown to create an Arc explosion that jolts targets it damages.

name: Stunning Recovery
description: Stunning a Champion refills your magazine, triggers health regeneration, and improves recovery for a short duration.

name: Move to Survive

description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming a Kinetic weapon.

description: Improves accuracy and stability while continuously holding down the trigger.

name: +10 Melee ▲

description: Increases your chance of finding ammo while you have a Shotgun equipped.

Critically wounding a target or breaking their shield infuses your melee attacks with Arc energy and increases your melee range against combatants and melee damage against combatants and Guardians for a short time.

Defeating targets with melee attacks makes you amplified and restores a portion of your health. Defeating more powerful combatants increases the amount of health restored.

description: Aiming down sights increases body shot damage, decreases target acquisition.

name: Controlled Demolition
description: Hitting a target with a Void ability or Volatile explosion makes them volatile. Further damage to a volatile target causes them to explode. Grants you and nearby allies health when volatile targets explode near you.

name: Auto Rifle Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Auto Rifles.

name: Elemental Charge
description: Become Charged with Light by picking up an elemental well. If the elemental well's element type matches your subclass element, you gain 2 stacks of Charged with Light.

name: Rat Pack
description: Fires full auto. Nearby Rat Kings increase strength.

name: Feeding Frenzy

name: Arc Weapon Analyzer
description: Generate Gunsmith telemetry data on Arc weapon kills.

name: Psionic Forging I
description: Increases the duration of the Psychohack Origin Trait and the effect of the Suros Synergy Origin Trait.

name: Psionic Forging II
description: Increases the duration of the Land Tank Origin Trait and the effect of the Häkke Breach Armaments Origin Trait.

name: High Ground

name: Valiant Charge
description: Receiving damage while guarding temporarily increases Sword lunge distance for an improved duration.

name: Sniper Damage Resistance
description: Reduces incoming damage from combatants that are at long range.

name: XP Boost
description: Increases experience gains for your Subclass, Weapons, and Armor.

name: Facet of Awakening
description: Rapidly defeating targets with Light or Darkness damage or Super final blows generates an Elemental pickup of the matching damage type.

name: Vanguard Scanner
description: Grants a chance to obtain additional faction consumables in Vanguard Ops.

name: Frostpulse

Casting your Rift generates a shockwave that freezes nearby targets, granting you Frost Armor when it does so.

Freezing combatants generates class ability energy.

name: Surprise Attack

name: Tear
description: Precision final blows cause nearby targets to become severed. Cooldown between activations reduced.

name: Void Flux

Defeating weakened targets with a [Void] Void weapon applies Volatile to nearby targets.
Powerful targets increase the radius of the explosion.

name: Particle Reconstruction

name: Heavy Ordnance Regeneration

name: Elemental Supercharger
description:
Defeating exhausted or severed targets with weapons that match your Super element grants Super energy.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Recombination
description: Elemental final blows increase the damage of this weapon's next shot.

name: Bow Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Bow ammo you can carry.

name: Suros Synergy
description: Reloading grants this weapon improved bonus handling and reduces incoming flinch for a short time.

name: Bow Dexterity
description: Faster ready and stow speed for Bows.

name: Relentless Strikes
description: [Light Attack]  : Landing three light-attack hits within an improved short time grants Sword ammo.

name: Sentry +1
description: Equip multiple pieces from this set to unlock Gambit Prime set perks.

name: Sentry +3
description: Equip multiple pieces from this set to unlock Gambit Prime set perks.

description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Kinetic weapons.

name: Dimensional Shift
description: Collecting a Void Breach causes final blows to provide a Void Overshield.

name: Energy Transfer
description: Guarding while receiving damage generates class ability energy at an improved rate.

name: Strange Signal
description: The Vex were responding to a strange signal coming from Nexus…

name: Bow Reloader
description: Increases the nocking speed of arrows.

name: Accelerator: Better with Friends
description: Playing Ops activities in a fireteam increases your damage; playing with a clanmate further increases the effect.

name: High-Energy Fire
description: While Charged with Light, gain a bonus to weapon damage. Each defeated combatant consumes one stack of Charged with Light.

name: Empowered Finish
description: Become Charged with Light by finishing a combatant, consuming one-tenth of your Super energy.

name: Shield Break Charge
description: Become Charged with Light by breaking a combatant shield with the matching energy type.

name: Taking Charge
description: Become Charged with Light by picking up Orbs of Power.

name: Drengr's Lash
description:
Activate Thruster to create an unstable knot of [Strand] Strand matter that detonates after a short delay, suspending and damaging targets.

Final blows on targets affected by elemental debuffs grant Thruster energy.

name: Veteran's Wisdom
description: Rapid or precision final blows release a larger Kinetic shockwave that exhausts targets.

name: Cold Steel
description: Powered Sword hits slow targets.

name: Transcendent Duelist
description:
This weapon collects less ammo. Final blows with this weapon accelerate Light and Darkness mastery.
Deals increased damage while Transcendent; defeating targets lengthens Transcendence.

name: Air Control
description: This vehicle gains increased agility while airborne.

name: Piled High
description: Adds a gift pile appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Noble Rounds
description: Absorbing Remnants allows you to fire ally-seeking Noble Rounds.

name: Crow's Wings
description: [Heavy Attack]  : Fire a projectile.

name: Soulsknot
description: Adds a ribbon of spectral energy to your transmat effects.

name: Arachnophile
description: Adds a nest of spiders to your transmat effects.

name: Bolt Thrower
description: High power explosive bolts.

name: Evolution
description:
Transmutation spheres you create can be picked up and wielded as weapons by you or your allies.
• [Light Attack]  : Light attack
• [Heavy Attack]  : Suppressing heavy attack
• [Block]  : Guard/drain nearby targets

name: Iron Grip
description: Massively improves weapon stability at the cost of a reduced amount of reload speed.

name: Feed the Void
description:
Defeat a target with a Void ability to activate Devour.

Your Devour effects are improved, restoring additional health and grenade energy.

name: Precision Frame
description: Fires a long-range precision energy bolt.

name: -5 Weapon ▼
description: -5 Weapon ▼

name: Subjugation
description:
Weapon adapts to targets. When dealing damage:

• To weak targets: shots create an improved explosion
• To strong targets: targets become exhausted
• To Guardians: the weapon's flinch resistance increases for an improved duration

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Crucible Effects
description: Adds a Crucible crest to your transmat effects.

name: Strength of Rasputin
description: Collecting a Warmind Cell grants you melee energy.

name: Modular Lightning
description: Collecting a Warmind Cell creates a burst of chaining Arc energy around you.

name: Chosen of the Warmind
description: Collecting or destroying a Warmind Cell creates a concussive blast that pushes enemies away.

name: Sheltering Energy
description: Collecting a Warmind Cell grants you an overshield.

name: Heretical Behavior

name: Concentrated Mattergem
description:
Bosses have a chance to drop an Upgrade Module when defeated.

Effect lasts until an Upgrade Module is found. Only one Concentrated Mattergem can be active at a time.

name: Bandolier
description: Grants slightly increased ammo generation and magazine size.

name: The Whispers
description: Gain an additional melee charge.

name: Deprecated Perk

description: Faster ready and stow speed for Submachine Guns.

description: Armor Set—Invader +3

description:
Supercharge your fists and slam the ground with the force of a maelstrom. While active:

[Light Attack]  : Quickly dash forward, dealing damage to any impacted targets.

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your fists to the ground, blinding targets and dealing damage in an area around you, leaving aftershocks in your wake. Performing a slam from the air or after a dash deals additional damage.

name: Thundercrash
description: Hurtle through the air like a missile and crash into targets to inflict meteoric damage.

name: Enhanced Unflinching Bow Aim
description: Greatly reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Bows.

name: Crucible Blue
description: Adds a blue Crucible crest to your transmat effects.

description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Kintsugi

name: Veist Stinger
description: Damaging an enemy with this weapon has a small chance to reload the magazine and increase movement speed while aiming down sights. Bows receive faster draw speed and swords receive faster charge rate while this perk is active.

name: Barrel Constrictor
description: Final blows with this weapon reduce its projectile spread for a short duration.

name: Headseeker
description: Body shots landed with this weapon increase precision damage and aim assist for a short time. Body shots landed while the perk is active refresh the time.

name: Perpetual Destruction

name: Elemental Siphon

name: Photonic Flare

Defeating an exhausted or severed target with [Arc]Arc damage releases a blinding burst.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Disruptor Spike
description:
Improves the effects of Exhaust and Sever, lowering a target's damage output even further.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: King's Vestige

Defeating powerful Taken loads your weapon with Taken energy. The next time you fire, launch 3 Taken seeker rounds that [Disruption] disrupt and exhaust targets.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Dielectric
description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

name: Hold the Line
description: While surrounded, Machine Guns and Glaives gain increased reload speed and stability; final blows heal you.

name: Lucent Shrieker Entrance
description: Adds a Lucent Hive Shrieker to your transmat effects.

name: Wellspring

name: Hatchling
description: Precision final blows or rapidly defeating targets with this weapon spawns a Threadling at the target's location. There's a chance to spawn an increased amount of Threadlings.

name: Adept Blast Radius
description: +10 Blast Radius

name: Strike Paragon
description: A member of your fireteam has used a Fireteam Medallion, granting all members of the fireteam increased XP gains and loot from strike completion.

name: Splicer Surge
description: Reloading this weapon after dealing damage grants the weapon a stacking reload speed and handling bonus until stowed.

name: Shooting Star
description: Celebrate your achievements with style and alacrity!

name: Daybreak
description:
Fashion Solar Light into blades and smite your foes from the sky.

Your Daybreak projectiles scorch targets on impact.

name: Well of Radiance
description: Thrust your Sword into the ground, damaging and scorching nearby targets. The sword projects a continuous aura, granting radiant effects and restoration to nearby allies, protecting them from the effects of Stasis.

name: Song of Flame
description:
Unleash your inner fire, making your equipped weapons radiant and enhancing your abilities.

[Melee]  : Release a supercharged melee attack that launches additional projectiles.

[Grenade]  : Create a sentient flame wisp that seeks out targets and detonates in a scorching explosion, then seeks out other nearby targets.

While Song of Flame is active, you and nearby allies regenerate abilities more quickly, are more resistant to incoming damage, and your [Solar] Solar and Kinetic weapons scorch targets.

name: Archer's Tempo
description: Draw time decreases after every precision hit.

name: Glacial Quake
description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis gauntlet. While your Super is active:

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your gauntlet down to create a shockwave that freezes targets and sends out [Stasis] Stasis crystals to freeze additional ones.

[Light Attack]  : Supercharge your Shiver Strike for bonus damage. Sprint through [Stasis] Stasis crystals or frozen targets to shatter them instantly.

name: Anomalous Archaeologist
description: Grants a chance to receive additional Etheric and Baryon resources when collecting them in the Reef.

name: Arc Ability Module
description:
Class abilities recharge faster when using an Arc subclass.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

name: Auto Rifle Scavenger
description: Auto Rifles get bonus reserves when you pick up ammo.

name: Embers of Light
description: Create combination Healing/Empowering Rifts.

name: Kinetic Tremors
description: Sustained kinetic damage to a target emits a shockwave that damages any nearby targets.

name: Heavy Metal
description: While holding down the trigger, every fourth bullet becomes a heavy projectile that makes targets volatile on impact.

name: Overcharged Armory
description: Weapons with the Dealer's Choice, Radiolaria Transposer, Collective Purpose, and Sundering Origin traits are always Overcharged weapons for you when that modifier is active.

name: Authorized Mod: Elemental Charge
description: The energy cost of Elemental Charge mods are significantly discounted.

name: Logic Reductor
description: Weapons with the Radiolaria Transposer origin perk deal increased damage to Vex. Extends the duration of the radiolaria pools created by Radiolaria Transposer.

name: Authorized Mods: Scavenger
description: The energy cost of Scavenger mods are significantly discounted.

name: Authorized Mod: Charged Up
description: The energy cost of the Charged Up mod is significantly discounted.

name: Saint's Inspiration
description: Rounds loaded by the Cast No Shadows origin perk can overflow the magazine.

name: Winning Hand
description:
While using weapons with the Dealer's Choice origin trait, combatant precision final blows or rapidly defeating combatants cause the target to explode, dealing Solar damage to nearby combatants.

Having several equipped weapons with the Dealer's Choice origin trait increases the effect of the explosion.

name: Heating Up
description: Final blows with this weapon increase accuracy and stability while improving vertical recoil.

name: Replenishing Guard
description: Greatly increases the charge rate for your equipped Swords.

name: Psychohack
description:
Sustained damage from this weapon exhausts the target for an improved duration.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Demolitionist Armorer

name: Harmonic Siphon
description: Rapid weapon final blows with damage matching your subclass type create an Orb of Power.

name: The Corruption Spreads
description: This weapon creates SIVA nanite swarms on rapid hits and precision kills.

name: Dragonfly
description: Precision kills create an elemental damage explosion.

name: Unflinching Light Arms Aim

name: On Black Wings
description: Landing the majority of the pellets in a spread or pellet final blows, grants stacking precision damage and a reload speed buff. Precision hits with slugs extend the duration.

name: Minor Grenade Mod
description: Increases the Grenade stat.

name: Unflinching Arc Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming an Arc weapon.

name: Moon Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 30-meter range while on the Moon.

Pulse Rifles you are wielding fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Pulse Rifles deal bonus damage against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Unstoppable Bow
description: Crossbows, and Bows that have been fully drawn for a short time, fire a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

name: Disruptor Spike
description: Improves the effects of disruption, lowering combatants' damage output even further.

name: Hunter's Trace
description: Precision hits grant heavy rounds. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Overflowing Light

name: Anti-Flinch

description:

Picking up a Firesprite grants restoration.

name: One-Two Punch
description: Hitting a target with nearly every pellet in a shot increases melee damage for a short duration.

name: Restorative Finisher
description:
When you use a finisher, you gain a portion of energy for your least-recharged ability. 

Consumes 2 stacks of Armor Charge.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: Gain a tactical air move.

description:
This weapon deals increased damage against vehicles and constructs.

Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.

name: Solar Impact Accelerator
description:
Solar melee abilities recharge faster.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

name: Killing Tally
description: Kills increase this weapon's damage until it is stowed or reloaded.

description: Glaive projectile final blows improve Glaive melee damage. Glaive projectile or melee damage extends the duration.

name: Tap the Trigger
description: Grants a short period of increased stability and accuracy on initial trigger pull.

name: Berserk Rush

name: Rimestealer

name: UNLOCKED BY QUEST
description:
ASPECT OF INTERFERENCE
Purchase this Stasis Aspect from the Exo Stranger on Europa after completing the Beyond Light campaign.

name: Elemental Munitions

name: Monochromatic Maestro

name: Rapid-Fire Ranger

name: Well of Life

Defeating Fallen Captains grants destination materials.

Mod does not stack.

name: Stopping Power

name: Taken Repurposing

name: Dealer's Choice

name: Fusion Rifle Ammo Finder

name: Empowering Largesse
description:
While you're on the Leviathan, activating an Arc Super recharges your grenade.

This mod's abilities cannot stack across multiple copies.

name: Extrovert
description: Final blows while near multiple combatants or near Nightmares restores an improved amount of health.

name: Void Impact Accelerator
description:
Void melee abilities recharge faster.

name: Deprecated Perk

description:
Powerful, heavy swings.
[Heavy Attack]  : Slam.

name: Special Ammo Finder
description: Increases the effect of all contributions towards the Special ammo meter.

name: Caster Frame
description:
[Heavy Attack]  : Launch a heavy projectile attack.
Heavy attacks are stronger with full energy.

name: Guardian Effects

Hellion damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

name: Air Trigger
description: Greatly increased ammo generation. When airborne, accuracy and reload speed are further increased but target acquisition is decreased.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Disruption Weapon [Shield-Piercing]
description: Fires a single heavy-hitting round. Disintegrates targets on impact. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Enhanced Reload

name: Iron Reach
description: Massively improves weapon range at the cost of a reduced amount of weapon stability.

name: Built Bitter

name: Bittersweet
description: When you stow a weapon, restore health based on the number of Built Bitter stacks lost.

name: Remote Shield
description: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : When weapon is fully charged, consume charge before firing to make your next shot deploy a protective shield on impact. Passing through the protective shield provides a Void Overshield and improves weapon damage, reload speed, and handling.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Physic

[###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_button###][###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_verb###] with the bolt to retrieve it.

name: Shadowshot: Moebius Quiver
description:
Tether foes to a Void Anchor, dramatically weakening and suppressing them for you and your allies.

Fire two volleys of three Void Arrows that seek nearby targets. Shadowshot makes targets volatile and deals increased damage to tethered targets. Defeating tethered targets creates Orbs of Power.

While the Super is active, dealing damage increases the damage of your Void Arrows and Bow weapons.

name: Shadowshot: Deadfall
description:
Tether foes to a Void Anchor, dramatically weakening and suppressing them for you and your allies.

The Void Anchors fired from Shadowshot pull targets toward the impact point, which then become traps and wait for prey. Void Anchors have increased range and last longer.

name: Spectral Blades
description:
Summon a pair of deadly Void blades and stalk the battlefield in a veil of shadows.

[Light Attack]  : Perform a quick melee attack.

[Heavy Attack]  : Perform a heavy attack that weakens your target, and once again vanish from sight.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

name: Icarus Grip

name: Glimmershard
description:
Defeated bosses have a chance to create a shower of Glimmer.

Effect lasts for 4 hours.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Radiant Shrapnel
description: Dealing sustained weapon damage while Radiant or defeating a scorched combatant with a weapon causes the target to release Solar projectiles that deal damage and scorch on impact.

name: Shieldcrush
description:
While you have Woven Mail, Frost Armor, or a Void overshield, your melee recharges faster and deals increased damage.

While you are Amplified or Radiant, your grenade recharges faster and deals increased damage.

name: Elemental Overdrive
description: Picking up an Elemental pickup or Tangle grants increased damage to weapons of the same element.

name: Tangled Web
description: Creating a Tangle by defeating a [Strand]Strand debuffed target suspends nearby combatants.

name: Frigid Glare
description: While Frost Armor is active, [Stasis]Stasis precision final blows cause combatants to release a freezing burst.

name: Iron Lord's Vigor
description: While wielding a Sword, you take decreased damage; rapid final blows grant ammo to the wielder.

name: Argent Quiver
description: Reloading a Bow consumes one stack of Armor Charge, granting increased damage and reload speed for your next 3 shots or until you stow your Bow.

name: EDZ Experience Log
description: Gain 10% more XP while in the EDZ.

name: Stolen Light
description: Adds stolen Light to your transmat effects.

name: Focused Light
description: When you have Field of Light, gain increased weapon damage and resilience.

name: Focused Darkness
description: When you have Flux of Darkness, gain increased ability damage and mobility.

name: Release Recover
description: When you lose Flux of Darkness or Field of Light, begin recovering health.

name: Cabal Extinguisher
description: When an ally gains Flux of Darkness or Field of Light, deal increased weapon damage to Cabal combatants for a short time.

name: Spring-Auger Bolts
description:
Bolts release an impulse shortly after impact that deals a small amount of damage and has a high chance to cause flinch.
[###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_button###][###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_verb###] with the bolt to retrieve it.

name: Cursed Thrall
description: After defeating a target with a melee attack, final blows with this weapon cause targets to explode for a short duration.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Overloaded Auto/SMG
description:
Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Auto Rifles and Submachine Guns grants bullets that stun combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Improve Side Boost
description: This vehicle has improved dodging from side to side.

name: Auto Rifle Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Auto Rifles over time. Multiple copies of this perk stack to reduce the time taken to fully reload.

name: Power Surge
description: Rapid hits charge your next shot into an explosive round that deals additional damage and accelerates power buildup on hit. While empowered, every shot is explosive.

name: Trace Rifle Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Special ammo while you have a Trace Rifle equipped.

name: Collective Purpose
description: Gain bonus range and handling when near allies. Bows receive faster draw time and Swords receive faster charge rate. The effect scales with the number of nearby allies.

name: Focused Optics
description: Increased zoom and effective range when aiming down sights.

name: Well of Potency
description: Picking up a matching elemental well grants you Super energy.

name: Materialism (Crucible)
description: Crucible wins have a chance to award destination materials.

name: Linear Fusion Rifle Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Linear Fusion Rifle ammo you can carry.

name: Flourishing Blade
description:
Defeating combatants or opponents with Swords has a chance to grant a large amount of Glimmer.

Mod does not stack.

name: Triple Tap
description: Landing precision hits will return one round to the magazine.

name: Manifested Power
description: Adds a powerful appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Reign Havoc
description: Final blows generate lightning strikes and grant a stack of Bolt Charge. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Ember of Solace

name: Solar Plexus
description: Increases damage of all Solar melee abilities. Gain Super energy from performing finishers with a Solar subclass equipped.

name: Heavy Burst

name: Wish-Dragon's Talons
description: Gain an additional Frenzied Blade charge. Banner of War grants melee energy.

name: Sidearm Dexterity
description: Faster ready and stow speed for Sidearms.

name: Rocket Launcher Scavenger
description: Rocket Launchers get bonus reserves when picking up Heavy ammo.

name: Tri-Planar Mass Driver

name: Sidearm Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Sidearms over time. Multiple copies of this perk stack to reduce the time taken to fully reload.

name: Disaster Plan
description:
Picking up ammunition increases this weapon's flinch resistance and range, which lasts until it is fired again.

Swords gain a large increase to charge rate instead.

name: Enhanced Unflinching Grenade Launcher Aim
description: Greatly reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Grenade Launchers.

name: Minor Resist

name: Vanishing Shadow

description: Your equipped Scout Rifles and Pulse Rifles fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Daily Ops Focus
description: Gain an additional bonus engram on a Daily Focus activity in Ops.

name: Pugilist
description:
Final blows with this weapon generate improved melee energy. 
Dealing melee damage briefly improves this weapon's handling.

name: Turnabout
description: Using this weapon to break the shield of a combatant or a Guardian using their Super will grant you an overshield for an improved duration.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Thread of Finality
description: Finisher final blows create Threadlings.

name: Blade Barrage

name: Redemption

name: Aeon Energy
description: Throwing grenades grants energy to nearby Aeon Cultists.

name: Supercharged Magazine

While amplified, ammo is gradually transferred from reserves to the magazine. 

While in Speed Booster, ammo regenerates faster and overflows the magazine.

name: Bulwark Armorer
description: Acquired armor pieces with randomized stats are more likely to drop with the Bulwark archetype, which has Health as its primary stat and Class as its secondary.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Strategist
description: Final blows with this weapon generate improved class ability energy. Activating your class ability briefly improves this weapon's stability.

name: Adamantine Brace
description: Bow perfect draw can be held indefinitely for increased damage.

name: Sharp Edges

name: Flight
description: Grants increased persistence and projectile speed.

name: Adept Projectile Speed
description: +10 Projectile Speed

name: Hand Cannon Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Hand Cannons.

name: Flame Harvesting
description: Solar Exotic final blows create Solar elemental wells.

name: Solar Fulmination

name: Classy Restoration
description: Activating your Solar class abilities grants you restoration.

name: Radiant Orbs

name: Rays of Precision

name: Circle of Life
description: Rapidly healing allies grants this weapon an improved period of increased damage.

name: Lucky Shot
description: Reloading after a precision final blow causes precision hits to refill a round from reserves.

name: Ravenous Beast

name: House of Light Entrance
description: Adds a House of Light appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Machine Gun Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Machine Guns over time. Multiple copies of this perk stack to reduce the time taken to fully reload.

description: Increases reload speed of Auto Rifles.

name: Bountiful Harvest

description: Faster ready and stow speed for Grenade Launchers.

name: Glowing Embers
description: Glowing Embers

name: Shining Embers
description: Shining Embers

name: Rampage
description: Kills with this weapon temporarily grant increased damage. Stacks 3x.

name: Conserve Momentum
description: Hits decrease charge time.

name: Sympathetic Arsenal
description: Reloading after a final blow also reloads stowed weapons.

description: This armor piece adds +1 to your overall Power and +10% damage with Arc weapons against combatant shields when you have an Arc subclass equipped.

Throwing a grenade or hitting a target with a charged melee grants an improved stacking bonus to weapon stability, handling, and range.

Using a Super grants maximum stacks.

description: Greatly improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Scout Rifles.

description: This weapon slowly reloads itself over time, up to double capacity.

name: +5 Super ▲ / -5 Class ▼
description: +5 Super ▲ / -5 Class ▼

name: +15 Super ▲
description: +15 Super ▲

name: Balanced Guard
description: Sword Guard has balanced overall defenses.

description: Your Kinetic weapons gain a small bonus to damage while you have any Armor Charge. Your Armor Charge now decays over time.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: Fires a stream of sentient projectiles.

name: Rocket Launcher Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Rocket Launchers.

description: Final blows with this weapon temporarily grant increased damage, reload speed, and range. This effect is frozen in time while the weapon is stowed.

description: Stasis final blows transfer ammo to this weapon's magazine from reserves.

description:
Summon two Stasis kamas, Silence and Squall, that you throw one after another.

Silence : Creates a flash-freeze blast that freezes and damages targets.

Squall : Creates a Stasis Storm that slows and damages targets caught inside.

name: Amethyst Rabbit
description: Adds a purple rabbit crest to your transmat effects.

description:
Cast your class ability to grant a moderate amount of Bolt Charge stacks to you and nearby allies.

While behind your Barricade, you and allies gain stacks of Bolt Charge over time and your weapons can discharge max stacks of Bolt Charge.

name: The Gift of Certainty
description: Improves Ascension and Tempest Strike.

name: Explosive Pact

name: Chill Out
description: Defeating a combatant with a Stasis weapon spawns a Stasis crystal. Must have a Stasis subclass equipped.

name: Ignoble Deeds

name: Improved Titan Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 40-meter range while on Titan.

name: Needlestorm
description:
[Super]  : Conjure a hail of deadly woven needles.

After embedding themselves in the environment, the needles will re-weave into a host of Threadlings.

Threadlings you create will return to you and perch if they can't find any nearby targets. Damaging targets with your weapons or melee will send out perched Threadlings to attack.

name: Void Scavenger
description: Void weapons get bonus reserves when picking up ammo used by that weapon.

name: Trials of Osiris
description: Reach seven wins to claim Passage rewards. Each win contributes to the total Crucible Performance Multiplier.

name: +15 Melee ▲
description: +15 Melee ▲

name: Hand Cannon Dexterity
description: Faster ready and stow speed for Hand Cannons.

name: Reactive Booster

name: Force Converter
description: After a final blow with a Rocket Launcher, Grenade Launcher, or micro-missile, sprint for a short time to gain Speed Booster.

name: Violent Reanimation
description: Multiple final blows with this weapon grant Devour to the wielder.

name: Io Scout Reports
description: Highlights nearby loot caches on Io for you and your fireteam.

name: Sundering
description:
Destroying vehicles and constructs or breaking target shields grants this weapon bonus reload speed and charge rate.

Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.

description: Grants increased reload speed when close to full magazine.

name: Unstoppable Sniper Rifle
description:
Aiming down the sights of a Sniper Rifle for a short time loads a powerful payload that stuns unshielded combatants. 

Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

name: UNLOCKED BY QUEST
description: Purchase this Stasis Fragment from the Exo Stranger on Europa after completing the Beyond Light campaign.

name: Union of Recovery
description: Increased recovery when you're in a fireteam with clanmates.

name: Blast Off

name: Facet of Bravery

name: Striking Light

name: Meaning-Making

Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Auto Rifles grants bullets that stun combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.
