description: Casting your class ability heals you and nearby allies.

name: Rangefinder
description: Aiming this weapon increases its effective range and zoom magnification, and improves handling. Increased projectile velocity while aiming Rocket Launchers, Grenade Launchers, and Bows.

name: Reflex Brackets Mod
description: Improves weapon handling for equipped Power weapon.

name: Pump Action
description: Gain bonus Super energy on Shotgun kills.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Volatile Light
description: Overpenetrating ricocheting rounds. Bonus damage on bounce.

name: Adaptive Glaive
description: [Aim Down Sights]  : Raise shield

name: [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_status_button###][###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_summon_vehicle_button###] : Activate Matterspark anywhere on Kepler.
description: [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_status_button###][###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_summon_vehicle_button###] : Activate Matterspark anywhere on Kepler.

name: Thresh
description: Killing combatants with this weapon generates a small amount of Super energy.

name: Disorganized Attachment
description: Nests now mature over time. Fully mature nests can be harvested with [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_button###] [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_verb###] to grant yourself a held Tangle.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Alacrity
description: Gain even more increased reload, stability, aim assist, and range when an ally is defeated. Bonus further increases when multiple allies are dead at the same time or when you are running solo.

name: Temporal Armaments
description: This weapon gains improved bonus damage versus Cabal and Vex targets.

name: Yellow Dawning Lantern
description: Adds a yellow Dawning lantern to your transmat effects.

name: Dynamic Heat Weapon
description: Higher base damage, increased damage versus powerful combatants. High heat generated. [Reload]  to vent heat from the weapon. Overheating forces a sustained vent. Weapon cools down more rapidly between shots.

name: Trench Barrel
description: After a successful melee hit, this weapon gains increased damage, handling, and reload speed for a short duration—or until three shots are fired.

name: Reactive Shock
description: When Force Absorption is active, taking melee damage causes you to emit a disorienting burst once.

name: Force Absorption
description: Final blows with a Rocket Launcher, Grenade Launcher, or micro-missile temporarily decrease incoming area-of-effect damage.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Warmind's Decree
description: Void splash damage final blows have a chance to create Warmind Cells.

name: Alchemical Etchings
description: Rifts increase weapon reload speed. Empowering Rift increases range.

name: Strange Protractor
description: Buffs sprint. Sprinting reloads current weapon.

name: Tectonic Harvest
description:
Picking up [Stasis] Stasis shards grants stacks of Frost Armor.

While you have Frost Armor, defeating combatants with Stasis or Kinetic weapons may cause them to shatter, damaging other nearby combatants. The shatter chance increases with your Frost Armor stacks.

Taking damage while you have Frost Armor generates melee energy.

name: Enlightened Action
description: Dealing damage significantly improves reload speed and handling.

name: Iron Reach
description: Massively improves weapon range at the cost of weapon stability.

name: Pinpoint Slug Frame
description: Fires a single-slug round.

name: Enhanced Handling
description: +10 Handling

name: Malevolent Grasp
description: Improves suspend, causing damage over time. Using your Rift also suspends nearby targets.

name: Accelerated Coils
description: Speeds up weapon charge.

name: Nessus Glimmer Scavenger
description: Increase Glimmer gains by 10% on Nessus.

name: Guardian Pink
description: Adds a pink Guardian crest to your transmat effects.

name: Full Auto Trigger System
description: Holding down the trigger will fire this weapon at full auto. Improves reload.

name: Sword Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Sword ammo you can carry.

name: Destabilizing Rounds
description: Defeating a target creates a Void burst; hitting other targets with this burst makes them volatile and grants you Volatile Rounds for a short duration.

name: Thermoplastic Grenades
description: Grenades fired from this weapon bounce further.

name: Volatile Volleys
description: Defeating powerful combatants with a Void weapon gives your Void weapons Volatile Rounds. Must have a Void subclass equipped.

name: +10 Class ▲
description: +10 Class ▲

name: Collective Demolition
description:
Collecting an Elemental pickup or destroying a Tangle grants this weapon a stacking period of improved grenade energy generation on hit. Throwing a Tangle provides additional time.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

name: Starless Night
description: Weapons of Light is improved; capable of extending Ward of Dawn's duration.

name: Heat of the Moment
description: While Ignition Trigger is active, final blows with this weapon cure you and sustained fire scorches your target.

name: Explosive Light
description: Picking up an Orb of Power increases the next projectile's blast radius and damage. Increases the stack count limit.

name: Sidearm Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Sidearms.

name: Enhanced Persistence
description: +10 Persistence

name: Survivalist Hunter Armor
description: Improved recovery.

name: Improved Hellas Basin Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 40-meter range while in Hellas Basin.

name: Trials of Osiris
description: Passage rewards have been claimed this week. Each win contributes to the total Crucible Performance Multiplier.

name: Three of Coins
description: Increased chance to receive Exotic engrams from sources in the world.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Hand Cannon Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chances of finding Special ammo while you have a Hand Cannon that uses Special ammo equipped.

name: Feed the Void
description:
Defeat a target with any ability to activate Devour.

Your Devour effects are improved, restoring additional health and grenade energy.

name: Both [Aim Down Sights] dash and [Super] blast apply jolt to combatants.
description: Both [Aim Down Sights] dash and [Super] blast apply jolt to combatants.

name: Glaive Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Glaives over time. Multiple copies of this perk stack to reduce the time taken to fully reload.

name: Foundry Sponsorship: Suros
description: Suros weapons deal overcharged damage in Ops activities.

name: White Nail
description: Higher base precision damage. Rapidly landing three precision hits will refill the magazine.

name: Flawless Lighthouse Passage
description:
Flawless Lighthouse Passage completed. Match wins will grant you a chance to earn Lighthouse chest rewards. Flawless and active win streaks contribute to your total Crucible Performance Multiplier.

Continuing to play on this Passage will match you versus other players with similar weekly performance.

name: Opening Shot
description: Greatly improved accuracy and range on the opening shot of attack.

name: Shotgun Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Shotguns.

name: Arc Damage Resistance
description: Reduces incoming Arc damage from combatants.

name: Demoralize
description: Precision final blows cause nearby targets to become weakened. Cooldown between activations reduced.

name: Stasis Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Stasis weapons over time.

name: Glaive of Dreams
description: While you have a Glaive equipped, the Unstable Essence buff gained by picking up objects dropped by Nightmares has double its normal duration.

name: Revitalizing Blast
description: Stunning a Champion causes it to ignite and clears your shield stun.

name: Overload Trace Rifles
description:
Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Trace Rifle causes the beam to stun combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and exhausting them.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.
Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Strand Weapon Surge
description: Your Strand weapons gain a small bonus to damage while you have any Armor Charge. Your Armor Charge now decays over time.

name: Empowered Finish
description: Finisher final blows grant you 1 temporary Armor Charge when you have none.

name: Overload Sword
description:
Landing consecutive hits with a Sword you are wielding disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. 

Additionally, Swords are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Advanced Reflexes
description: Upon taking damage from a target, quickly guard or aim down sights with this weapon to gain bonus damage, handling, and charge rate for a short time.

name: Elliptical Orbit
description: After briefly sprinting, gain increased ammo generation. Alternatively, gain stability, reload speed, and flinch resistance when not sprinting for a short time.

name: Stasis Ammo Generation
description: Increases the ammo generation of Stasis weapons.

name: Elemental Honing
description: Dealing unique elemental damage grants this weapon a stacking damage bonus. This bonus is increased for kinetic weapons.

name: Blast from the Side
description: Projectiles from the time portal shoot more frequently.

name: Seraph Reboot Entrance
description: Adds a seraphic reboot appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Trace Rifle Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Special ammo while you have a Trace Rifle equipped.

name: Armor of the Colossus
description: While at full health, spinning up this weapon protects you with an Arc shield.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Trample
description: Destroying enemies with Fists of Havoc extends its duration.

name: Stun Ventilator
description: Stunning a Champion vents a large amount of heat from this weapon.

name: Into the Fray
description:
Destroying a Tangle or casting your Super grants Woven Mail for nearby allies.

While you have Woven Mail, your melee regeneration rate is increased.

name: Static Buildup
description: While amplified, this weapon gradually gains overcharge.

name: Light from Darkness
description: Become Charged with Light by rapidly defeating multiple enemies near a Warmind Cell using weapons or abilities.

name: Warmind's Longevity
description: Warmind Cells you create last longer.

name: Warmind's Protection
description: You take reduced damage from enemies that are near Warmind Cells.

name: Power of Rasputin
description: You gain a bonus to weapon damage against enemies that are near Warmind Cells.

name: Cellular Suppression
description: Damaging a Warmind Cell creates a burst of suppressing Void energy. Additionally, you deal less damage to Warmind Cells.

name: Paracausal Fluid
description: Gain bonus handling and mobility when damaging targets with this weapon. Swords gain increased charge rate while this perk is active.

name: Randomized Perks + 1
description: This item comes with randomized perks, as well as an extra perk in the right trait column.

name: Shielding Hand
description:
While you're on the Leviathan, melee kills reduce incoming damage by 20%.

This mod's abilities cannot stack across multiple copies.

name: Thread of Continuity
description: Suspend, unravel, and sever effects applied to targets have increased duration.

name: Unflinching Power Aim
description: Slightly reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming a Power weapon.

name: Slice
description: Casting your class ability allows this weapon to sever targets on hit for an improved duration, up to a maximum number of targets.

name: Shield Disorient
description: Energy matched shield explosion disorients nearby combatants.

name: Elemental Ordnance
description: Defeating a combatant with a grenade spawns an elemental well that matches your subclass energy type.

name: Chomping at the Stem
description: After you have been Drained of Light, gain a bonus to mobility, weapon handling, and reload speed. Multiple copies of this mod stack to increase this benefit.

name: Weapon Ritualist
description: Earn bonus crafted weapon XP from completing ritual playlist activities.

name: Osteo Striga Catalyst
description: Final blows with corruption return ammo to the magazine.

name: Bountiful Bounties
description: The first clan bounty completed each week grants an Exotic engram.

name: Lucky Shot
description: Reloading after a precision final blow causes precision hits to refill a round from reserves for an improved duration.

name: Micro-Missile Frame
description: This weapon fires a high-speed micro-missile in a straight line and deals reduced self-damage. Move faster with this weapon equipped.

name: Disrupting Blade
description:
Landing consecutive hits on enemy targets disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption]  Overload Champions.

name: Void Resistance
description: Reduces incoming Void damage from combatants.

name: Veteran's Wisdom
description: Rapid or precision final blows release a Kinetic shockwave that exhausts targets.

name: Stat Penalty
description: -10 Discipline

name: +5 Melee ▲
description: +5 Melee ▲

name: Facet of Defiance
description: Finishers create a detonation that either jolts, scorches, slows, severs, or makes targets volatile based on the damage type of your equipped Super.

name: Unflinching Auto Rifle Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Auto Rifles.

name: Eyes on All
description: Tracks and fires at multiple targets simultaneously.

name: Pulse Rifle Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Pulse Rifles.

name: Fusion Rifle Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Fusion Rifles.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Heavy attacks mark targets; light attacks detonate them.

name: Yellow Class Sigil
description: Adds a yellow class sigil to your transmat effects.

name: Killing Wind
description: Final blows grant increased mobility, weapon range, and handling for a short duration.

name: Paracausal Beam
description: Beam deals Kinetic damage with bonus damage to shields.

name: Crackshot
description:
Activate your class ability to fire up to three scorching shots at combatants you've marked. Aim at targets to mark them.

Landing all three shots cures you.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

name: Pure Matterglass Lens
description: Precision kills have a chance to drop weapon telemetries.

name: Unflinching Sniper Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Sniper Rifles.

name: To the Pain
description:
While this weapon is equipped, taking damage increases handling and aim assist until the weapon is stowed.

Taking more damage increases the effect.

name: Knight Errant
description:
Defeating Hive Knights grants Destination Materials.

Mod does not stack.

name: Broadhead
description: Piercing arrowhead that damages the target on entry and exit. One shot can overpenetrate multiple targets.

name: One for Thrall
description: Hitting three separate targets increases damage, range, handling, and aim assist for a moderate duration.

name: Strategist
description: Final blows with this weapon generate class ability energy. Activating your class ability briefly improves this weapon's stability.

name: M1R Distribution Matrix
description: Guarding grants overshields to allies.

name: Assassin's Blade
description: Sword final blows boost movement speed and damage for an improved duration.

name: Kinetic Dexterity
description: Faster ready and stow speed for Kinetic weapons.

name: Hadopelagic Tribute
description: Collecting Stasis shards gradually overflows the magazine.

name: Vengeance
description: Highlight and defeat those that harm you for an overshield.

name: Hitting a morphable object with Mattermorph triggers Woven Mail.
description: Hitting a morphable object with Mattermorph triggers Woven Mail.

name: Mindspun Invocation
description:
Your grapple, Shackle Grenade, Threadling Grenade, and Slicewire Grenade have enhanced functionality.

Your grapple melee spawns three Threadlings.

[Grenade]  : Hold to consume your Shackle Grenade and activate Weaver's Trance. Final blows while Weaver's Trance is active create a suspending detonation.

[Grenade]  : Hold to charge your Threadling Grenade, causing it to weave a Threadling Nest at the impact location that repeatedly spawns Threadlings. 

[Grenade]  : Hold to charge your Slicewire Grenade. The grenade's final detonation will launch submunitions and leave a Tangle in its wake.

name: Coronal Culmination
description: This weapon can be charged with Solar energy to massively increase its damage.

name: Shieldburst
description:
Enhances your equipped barricade with [Solar] Solar capabilities.

Towering Barricade: Your barricade slides forward across the ground before stopping, allowing you to advance in safety.

Rally Barricade: Standing behind your barricade grants scorching rounds to your allies' Solar and Kinetic weapons.

While your barricade is deployed, activate your class ability again to remotely detonate it, scorching combatants caught in the detonation. Dealing damage increases the power of the blast.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

name: Unflinching Grenade Launcher Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Grenade Launchers.

name: Unstoppable Sidearm
description:
Aiming down sights with any Sidearm you are wielding loads a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants.

Strong against [Stagger]  Unstoppable Champions.

name: Shadowshot
description: Tether foes to a Void Anchor, slowing, weakening and suppressing them for you and your allies.

name: Spark of Volts
description: Finishers make you amplified and grant you a stack of Bolt Charge.

name: Delicate Tuning
description: While at low heat, this weapon has improved range, handling, and accuracy.

name: Solar Effects
description: Adds Solar elements to your transmat effects.

name: Pyrotechnic Entrance
description: Adds a ring of fire to your transmat effects.

name: Celebratory Entrance
description: Adds a golden filigree to your transmat effects.

name: Stack 'Em Up
description: Defeating targets with unique elemental damage grants a stacking bonus to Transcendence energy gains while Transcendence is inactive.

name: Burn 'Em Down
description: While Transcendence is active, using your grenade ability consumes all stacks of Stack 'Em Up to grant an escalating amount of grenade energy.

name: Pulse Rifle Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Pulse Rifles.

name: Jump Driver
description: Lorentz Driver gains an enhanced radar. Additionally, while this weapon has 3 telemetry patterns, EM Anomaly detonations no longer require a precision final blow.

name: Hands-On
description: Gain bonus Super energy on melee kills.

name: Reactive Pulse
description: While Charged with Light, when you take damage while surrounded by combatants, you emit a burst of damaging Arc energy, consuming one stack of Charged with Light.

name: Echo of Remnants
description: Your lingering grenade effects (Vortex Grenade, Void Wall, Void Spike, and Axion Bolt) have increased duration.

name: Insatiable
description: Ability energy for you and allies on Super cast.

name: Absorption Cells
description: Gain Super energy on elemental weapon takedowns.

name: Bricks from Beyond
description: Defeating a powerful combatant with a Void weapon has a chance to generate Heavy ammo progress for you and your teammates.

name: Flare Up
description: Firebolt Grenades apply more Scorch stacks. Damaging a combatant with a Firebolt Grenade spawns a Firesprite near them.

name: Origin Hones
description: Weapons with the Noble Deeds, Nanotracing Rockets, Tex Balanced Stock, and Ambush Origin Traits are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Allied Unraveling
description: Rapid final blows with a Strand weapon grant your weapon Unraveling Rounds, with a longer duration near allies.

name: Counterweave
description: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns or defeats a Champion, you gain energy for your least-charged Strand ability.

name: Enhanced Scatter Projectile Targeting
description: Greatly improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Auto Rifles, Machine Guns, SMGs, Pulse Rifles, Sidearms, and Fusion Rifles.

name: Breach Resonator
description: Grants melee and grenade energy on final blows with [Shield-Piercing] shield-piercing weapons or when a member of your fireteam stuns a Barrier Champion.

name: Mega Kill Clip
description: Reloading after a final blow grants a longer period of increased damage. Additional final blows before reloading further increases the duration of the damage period.

name: Butterfly
description: Aiming this weapon for a short period without firing causes your target to explode the next time you deal final blows. Timer resets when you stop aiming down sights.

name: Built to Blast
description: Gain lingering aim assist, stability, and flinch resistance while you have Woven Mail, Frost Armor, or Void Overshield.

name: Purple Dawning Lantern
description: Adds a purple Dawning lantern to your transmat effects

name: Ever Ready
description: Greatly increases the ready speed of Fusion Rifles, Shotguns, Submachine Guns, and Swords.

name: Slice
description: Casting your class ability allows this weapon to sever targets on hit for a brief duration, up to a maximum number of targets.

name: Elemental Honing
description: Dealing unique elemental damage grants this weapon a stacking damage bonus for an improved duration. This bonus is increased for kinetic weapons.

name: Cornered
description: Faster charge time or draw time and increased stability when surrounded by combatants.

name: +20 Super ▲
description: +20 Super ▲

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Enhanced Rifle Loader
description: Greatly increases reload speed of Rifle-class weapons.

name: EM Anomaly
description: A precision final blow with this weapon creates an implosion that pulls in nearby targets and damages them with an additional detonation.

name: Guardian Angel
description: Grants a chance to generate healing orbs for you on Scout Rifle, Sniper Rifle, Bow, and Linear Fusion Rifle precision final blows.

name: Facet of Protection
description: While surrounded by combatants, you are more resistant to incoming damage. While transcendent, the effect is increased.

name: Dearly Departed
description: Rift grants damage reduction. Grants Rift energy when critically wounded; creates healing rift on death.

name: Returner's Blessing
description:
While playing with a Returner, you receive the Returner's Blessing buff.

While you have the Returner's Blessing, you gain the following benefits:

• All XP earned is increased.
• Completing activities grants you an additional bonus Ops engram for a random activity.
• Completing activities has a chance to complete additional Common Orders.

name: Breach and Clear
description: When using a Grenade Launcher, damaging a boss, damaging a Champion, or breaking a combatant's shield reloads your stowed weapons and causes the combatant to take increased damage for a short duration.

name: Pyrotoxin Rounds
description: Fires high-powered explosive ammunition.

name: Traveler's Fervor
description: Sliding after sprinting for a short time sends forth a burning line of fire, dealing damage and scorching targets in its path.

name: Withering Gaze
description: Aiming this weapon for a shorter period of time without firing grants the ability to weaken the next target. Timer resets after firing or when you stop aiming down sights.

name: Worm's Hunger
description: Fires exploding Hive worms.

name: Protective Weave
description: Fire at your allies to grant Woven Mail.

name: Hand Cannon Scavenger
description: Hand Cannons that use Special ammo get bonus reserves when picking up Special ammo.

name: Hellas Basin Scanner
description: Grants a chance to obtain additional faction consumables in Hellas Basin.

name: +10 Super ▲
description: +10 Super ▲

name: Heavy Ammo Finder
description: Increases the effect of all contributions towards the Heavy ammo meter.

name: Dream Work
description: Once per reload, assists or assisted final blows partially refill the weapon from reserves for an improved amount and improve reload speed for a short duration. Bows receive improved draw time.

name: Dual Loader
description: Reloads an additional shot at a time.

name: Subjugator Entrance
description: Adds a resonant appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Ghost Purple
description: Adds a purple Ghost ring to your transmat effects.

name: Command Frame
description: Fires extended-range, heavy-caliber projectiles.

name: Methane Burst
description: Adds a methane burst appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Anti-Barrier Auto Rifle
description:
Auto Rifles you are wielding fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Auto Rifles deal bonus damage against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Dreaming City Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 30-meter range while in the Dreaming City.

name: Pulse Monitor
description: Automatically reloads the magazine and improves weapon handling when wounded—even when this weapon is stowed.

name: Ruinscribe's Forge
description: Creates a Ruinscribe Turret.

name: Mobility Armorer
description: Armor pieces with random stats you acquire will have a guaranteed minimum of 10 Mobility, and are more likely to drop with higher Mobility.

name: Sword Logic
description: Final blows with this weapon grant bonus damage for an improved duration. The strength and duration of the bonus increases when more powerful targets are defeated.

name: Soul of the Praxic Fire
description: Activating Solar class abilities grants an overshield and increases the cooldown of your class ability.

name: Benevolent Finisher
description:
Using a finisher on a combatant spawns Orbs of Power for your allies. 

Consumes 3 stacks of Armor Charge.

name: Pulse Rifle Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Primary ammo while you have a Pulse Rifle equipped.

name: Moon Combo Detector
description: Detect caches or resources within a 30-meter range while on the Moon.

name: Faster Summon
description: This vehicle takes less time to summon.

name: Sun Blast
description: Targets defeated with Sunshot explode in Solar energy, scorching other nearby targets.

name: Sprint Grip
description: Temporarily increases the weapon's ready speed and aim down sights speed after sprinting.

name: Hail Barrage
description: Fires Stasis arrows.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Double Fire
description: Hard-hitting twin-fire rounds.

name: Enhanced Shotgun Targeting
description: Greatly improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Shotguns.

name: Transcendent Moment
description: Final blows grant bonus stats based on the weapon's damage type alignment. Light elements grant improved stability and handling. Dark elements grant improved range and aim assist. While Transcendent, this weapon gets both bonuses.

name: Judgment
description: Sustained damage with this weapon envelops the target in a field that weakens and stuns them. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Unflinching Hand Cannon Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Hand Cannons.

name: Loss
description: This weapon gains bonus stability, handling, and aim assist whenever your shields are broken or when a friendly Guardian is defeated. Effect lasts until you are defeated.

name: Willing Vessel
description: Dealing damage or defeating targets with this weapon gradually grants increased stability, handling, reload speed, and charge rate. This effect gradually decreases over time but is gained more quickly while near allies.

name: Reanimated Entrance
description: Adds loose wrappings to your transmat effects.

name: Ghost Effects
description: Adds a Ghost ring to your transmat effects.

name: Whirlwind Blade
description: Rapid sword strikes increase this weapon's damage for a short duration. Guarding also ends the effect.

name: Chain Reaction
description: Each final blow with this weapon creates an elemental damage explosion.

name: Sentinel Shield
description:
[Super]  : Summon a shield of Void Light. 
While Sentinel Shield is active:
[Light Attack]  : Attack.
[Block]  : Block.
[Grenade]  : Perform a Shield Throw.

name: Ride Together, Die Together
description: When you pick up an Orb of Power, gain a brief period of rapidly decaying damage reduction.

name: Too Old for This
description: Defeating a powerful combatant with a finisher grants you Special ammo progress and replenishes a small amount of health.

name: Dimensional Shift
description: Collecting a Void Breach causes final blows to provide a higher value Void Overshield.

name: Dark Deliverance
description:
Fires remotely detonated projectiles that drop Void orbs on combatants.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

name: Gun and Run
description: Defeating targets builds stacks of Gun and Run for a short duration. Sprinting for a short time consumes a stack to partially reload this weapon's magazine from reserves; on Bows, this briefly improves draw speed.

name: Heavy Titan Armor
description: Improved resilience.

name: Howl of the Storm
description:
While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to launch a wave of [Stasis] Stasis energy forward that freezes enemy combatants, slows enemy players, and creates [Stasis] Stasis crystals.

Grants an additional melee charge.

name: CQC Optics: Low
description: Slightly reduces zoom magnification.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Worm Byproduct
description: Taking damage from your own worm projectile detonation empowers your weapons for a short time.

name: Wire Rifle
description: Swap between scopes to alter firing mode. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

name: Relay Defender
description: Gain an increase to weapon damage while within 5 meters of an active Vex Relay. Multiple copies of this mod stack to increase this benefit.

name: Spark of Feedback
description: Taking melee damage briefly increases your outgoing melee damage.

name: Bat Wing Entrance
description: Adds the illusion of bat wings to your transmat effects.

name: Temporal Anomaly
description:
While overcharged, each mode expends a portion of overcharge for additional effects on final blows or precision hits:

Arc mode calls down lightning strikes. 
Stasis mode creates an explosion and a formation of Stasis crystals.

name: Silent Alarm
description: Increases handling. Holstering this weapon automatically reloads it after a short period of time.

name: Primary Chain
description: Primary ammo weapon final blows grant a stacking bonus to mobility and Primary weapon range and handling until you are defeated.

name: Sublime Transit
description: Increases mobility and grants enhanced sprint speed and slide distance.

name: Unstoppable Sidearm
description:
Aiming down the sights of a Sidearm for a short time loads a powerful payload that stuns unshielded combatants. 

Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

name: Extrovert
description: Final blows while near multiple combatants or near Nightmares restores health.

name: Power Handicap
description: Your Power is reduced while in this activity.

name: Hearts of Ice

description: Precision spread. Final blows grant modification progress to MIDA Multi-Tool.

name: Liquid Cooling
description: Direct hits by a charged shot instantly freeze the target. Indirect hits freeze combatants and slow opposing Guardians.

name: Wind Chill
description: Rapid [Stasis] Stasis weapon hits grant you a stack of Frost Armor; hits against slowed or frozen targets also create a Stasis Shard.

name: Crystalline Converter
description:
After activating your class ability, your next [Stasis] Stasis weapon final blow creates a Stasis Shard. 

Gather Stasis Shards to gain stacks of Crystalline Converter, which cause your next powered Stasis melee hit to create Stasis crystals equal to the number of stacks you have.

name: Total Carnage
description: After finishing a powerful combatant, gain temporary damage resistance and replenish health.

name: Power from Pain
description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grants you Devour and creates a Void Breach.

name: Trace Evidence
description:
Rapid precision hits or rapid final blows on targets affected by Jolt or Blind will generate Ionic Traces.

Picking up an Ionic Trace grants an Armor Charge.

name: The Thick of It
description: Rapid final blows while surrounded grant you Armor Charge. While you are surrounded, your weapons have increased handling; Swords gain increased charge rate.

name: Finders Keepers
description: Picking up Special or Heavy ammo grants a chance to receive an Armor Charge. Heavy ammo grants a greater chance.

name: Overload Auto Rifle
description: Sustained fire from Auto Rifles disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Additionally, Auto Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Overload Pulse Rifle
description: Sustained fire from Pulse Rifles disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Additionally, Pulse Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Piercing Sidearms
description: Your equipped Sidearms fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. Additionally, Sidearms are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Unstoppable Hand Cannon
description: Aiming down the sights of a Hand Cannon for a short time loads a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions. Additionally, Hand Cannons are always overcharged when the modifier is active.

name: Unstoppable Bow
description: Holding a Bow fully drawn for a short time loads powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions. Additionally, Bows are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Aberrant Combustion
description: Precision final blows with Amalgamation Rounds cause the target to detonate into a weakening blast.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Berserker
description: When your Super ends, you gain a temporary bonus to weapon damage. The duration and strength of this bonus increases based on the number of combatants you defeated with your Super.

name: Surplus
description: Substantially increases handling, reload speed, and stability for each fully charged ability.

name: Overdrive
description: [Boost]  : Greater speed at risk of exploding.

description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Flame, Fiber, and Freeze

name: The Survivor

name: Child of the Old Gods
description:
Cast your rift to create a Void Soul. When you damage a target with a weapon, your Void Soul flies to them and drains them, doing damage and weakening them. Combatants affected by the Soul are also briefly suppressed.

When a target is being drained, you are granted grenade and melee energy (if running Healing Rift) or health (if running Empowering Rift).

Defeating a target who is being drained by your Void Soul grants class ability energy.

The Void Soul's damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

name: Regenerative Motion

name: Vigilant Watch

name: Iron Conviction
description: When your shields become broken, you gain increased ammo generation, flinch resistance, and damage resistance against nearby combatants for a short time. Final blows extend this effect.

name: Unstoppable Pulse Rifle
description:
Aiming down Pulse Rifle sights loads a high-impact burst that stuns unshielded combatants.

Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

name: Deprecated Perk

This buff commemorates a Bronze Tier score in the Guardian Games Rushdown activity on Expert mode.

Weapons and abilities empower each other. Defeating combatants with abilities grants increased weapon damage. Defeating combatants with weapons grants increased ability recharge speed. 

Active only in Guardian Games Rushdown activities. This buff will expire on weekly reset.

This weapon gains energy when you pick up Vestiges and allows you to create ammo at the projectile impact point for you and your allies. Special ammo mode unlocks at 50% energy, while Heavy ammo mode unlocks at 100% energy. 

To transform Vestiges into Special ammo, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to activate Special ammo mode. [Alternate Weapon Action]  a second time to activate Heavy ammo mode.

Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

After a short time, a devastating lightning bolt strikes the staff, overcharging it with Arc energy. While overcharged, your staff discharges lightning at nearby foes.

When the dagger hits a surface or a target, you blink to its location and perform a powerful whirling strike, damaging any nearby targets. Can be reactivated after the strike to perform additional throws.

If the dagger flies for long enough without impacting anything, it detonates and you blink to the detonation location.

This weapon deals additional damage to marked targets. Defeating a marked target or landing a precision final blow with an Amalgamation Round grants invisibility and truesight.

name: Heretical Behavior
description: Sustained weapon damage or final blows versus powerful targets grant this weapon bonus reload, handling, and damage versus combatants for an improved duration. Gain this bonus immediately for a significantly longer duration when you are revived.

name: Saint's Fists
description: Charge to fire 3 spreads of Kinetic slugs. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

name: Solar Impact Accelerator
description:
Solar melee abilities recharge faster.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

name: Overclock and Load
description: While you are amplified or have Bolt Charge, [Arc]Arc weapons gain increased handling and reload speed.

name: Deep Alchemy
description: Weapons with the Subjugation Origin Trait gain stability and reload speed for a short duration when hitting any target. These weapons are also overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Volatile Marksman
description: Rapid [Void]Void weapon precision hits and rapid Void weapon final blows grant Volatile Rounds. Volatile detonations grant class ability energy.

name: Legend Incarnate
description: Weapons with the Timelost Magazine Origin Trait gain bonus damage; these weapons are also overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Unraveling Orbs
description: Picking up an Orb of Power or a Tangle grants [Strand]Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.

name: Beam Medic
description:
Rapid Trace Rifle final blows heal you and nearby allies.
Powerful combatants increase the amount.

name: Vile Weave
description: Targets hit by your Tangles are severed. Reduce Tangle cooldown by picking one up.

name: Unflinching Large Arms
description: Slightly reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Rocket Launchers, Grenade Launchers, Machine Guns, and Shotguns.

name: Enhanced Submachine Gun Dexterity
description: Greatly increases ready and stow speed for Submachine Guns.

name: Pyretic Embrace
description: Casting a Solar Super restores you to full health and shields.

name: Thread of Transmutation
description: While you have Woven Mail, weapon final blows create a Tangle.

name: Swarmers
description: Threadlings spawn from Tangles and unravel targets.

name: Thundercrash
description: Hurtle through the air like a missile and crash into enemies to inflict meteoric damage.

name: Heavy Burst
description: Fires a hard-hitting, two-round burst. Slightly reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming.

name: Signal Intercept
description: Adds a modified Black Armory theme to your transmat effects.

name: Capsule Gang Entrance
description: Adds a neo-capsule appearance to your transmat effects.

name: +5 Weapons ▲ / -5 Health ▼
description: +5 Weapons ▲ / -5 Health ▼

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Deeper Pockets
description: Increased ammo reserves.

name: Ember of Resolve
description: Solar grenade final blows cure you.

name: +3 Health ▲
description: +3 Health ▲

name: +5 Health ▲
description: +5 Health ▲

name: Electrified Conductor
description: Receive a large amount of Special ammo when charging a conductor.

name: Public Defender
description: Increased loot from public events on all destinations.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Ward of Dawn
description:
Create a protective dome for you and your allies.

While inside Ward of Dawn, allies gain Void overshield and increased weapon damage, while targets inside the Ward are weakened.

The Ward's owner also gains increased melee damage while inside and can pick up and throw the Ward's core to reposition the Ward up to two times.

name: Sentinel Shield
description:
[Super]  : Summon a shield of Void Light. 
While Sentinel Shield is active:
[Light Attack]  : Attack.
[Block]  : Block.
[Grenade]  : Perform a Shield Throw.

Guard with Sentinel Shield to create a defensive wall that draws hostile fire. Allies behind the shield have increased survivability, weapon damage, and passive reload.

Guarding allies and blocking damage makes the shield last longer and increases your Shield Throw damage.

name: Twilight Arsenal
description:
[Super]  : Summon three Void axes and throw them at your foes one after another. On impact, the axes pull in nearby targets and detonate in a weakening explosion. After exploding, the axes can be picked up by you or your allies and used as a weapon for a short time.

While carrying a Void axe:
[Light Attack]  : Slash forward with your axe, dealing damage and weakening targets.
[Heavy Attack]  : Throw the axe, consuming all remaining ammo.

name: War Beast Entrance
description: Adds a beastly appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Lucent Flutter Entrance
description: Adds a lucent appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Hawthorne's Heroes
description: Grants a chance of receiving a Legendary engram when completing strikes with a clan member.

name: Gunner Armorer
description: Acquired armor pieces with randomized stats are more likely to drop with the Gunner archetype, which has Weapons as its primary stat and Grenade as its secondary.

name: Markov Chain
description: This weapon gains increased damage from melee kills and kills with this weapon. Melee kills grant ammo for this weapon.

name: Gift Recipient
description:
You will receive a gift from a generous Guardian if you complete this activity together.

Each type of gift can be awarded only up to 4 times per activity.

name: Blunt Execution Rounds
description: Damaging nearby combatants with melee abilities dramatically increases handling and damage. Expires after a short duration or the next shot.

name: Kinetic Munition Mod
description: Improves reload speed for equipped Kinetic weapon.

name: Relentless Tracker
description: Improves weapon damage after damaging a target with an ability.

name: Tension
description: Greatly increases draw time and accuracy.

name: Hellas Basin Resource Detector
description: Detect resources within a 30-meter range while in Hellas Basin.

name: Font of Might
description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants a temporary strong bonus to weapon damage of the same elemental type as your subclass.

name: Diamond Lance
description:
Shatter or defeat targets with [Stasis] Stasis abilities or weapons to create a Stasis lance.

[Shoot]  : Throw the lance to freeze targets on impact.

[Melee]  : Slam the lance to the ground to freeze targets in a small area.

name: EDZ Scout Reports
description: A member of your fireteam has used a Scout Report, which highlights nearby loot catches in the EDZ for all members of the fireteam.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Fleet Footed
description: Dealing damage grants you an extended window of increased movement speed and airborne effectiveness. Landing a final blow increases these effects.

name: Argent Ordnance
description: While Charged with Light, readying or firing a Rocket Launcher grants it increased damage and reload speed. Damaging a combatant with a rocket consumes one stack of Charged with Light.

name: Roaring Flames
description: Final blows with [Solar] Solar abilities or ignitions increase the damage of your Solar abilities. Stacks 3 times.

name: Void Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Void weapons.

name: Chaos Reach
description:
Unleash a long-range channeled beam of concentrated Arc energy.
[Super]  : Use while active to deactivate Chaos Reach early and save Super energy.

name: Hallowed Geometry
description: Adds a hallowed geometry appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Headstone
description: Precision final blows spawn a large Stasis crystal at a target's location.

name: Dielectric
description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

name: Armorsmith

name: Counter Energy
description: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.

name: Combination Argent Blade
description: Briefly pause after executing a light attack, then follow it up with a light or heavy attack to empower your Sword for a short time, granting it bonus damage and charge rate.

name: Singularity Blade

name: Blinding Jolts
description: Final blows on jolted combatants blind nearby combatants.

name: Precision Equity
description: Precision final blows build progress towards a large Orb of Power that also grants bonus weapon damage on pickup. Higher ranked targets grant more progress.

name: Strand Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Strand weapons.

name: Minor Melee Mod
description: Increases the Melee stat.

name: Randomized Perks + 1
description: This item comes with randomized perks, as well as an extra perk in the left trait column.

name: Subatomic Distortion
description:
Fires projectiles made of compressed quantum particles that decompress within targets after a short delay, lacerating them.

Over-pressurizing this weapon with Quantum Nova releases a detonation around you.

name: Last Stand
description: Improved weapon performance and greatly increased recovery when its wielder is the last living member of a fireteam.

name: Solar Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Solar weapons.

name: Rampage Spec
description: Increases duration of Rampage.

name: Superluminal Motion
description: After dealing damage with your Super, health and shields regenerate over time while you are in motion. Additional Super damage refreshes this effect.

name: Special Relativity
description: Picking up ammo reloads stowed Special weapons from reserves.

name: Improved Crucible Scanner
description: Increased chance to obtain additional faction consumables in the Crucible.

name: Spark of Resilience
description: Spark of Resilience

name: Bolstering Detonation
description: Grants class ability energy when you cause damage with a grenade.

name: Will of Light (Kinetic)
description: Your equipped weapons that deal Kinetic damage deal increased damage to Taken combatants.

name: Old Gods' Boon
description: Gain damage reduction while carrying the King's Fall relic.

name: Run for Your Life
description: Gain increased mobility and resilience while you are Torn Between Dimensions.

name: Mortal Medicine
description: Gain increased recovery and weapon reload speed while you have a Brand or are in a pool of Reclaimed Light.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Arcology Scout Reports
description: A member of your fireteam has used a Scout Report, which highlights nearby loot catches on Titan for all members of the fireteam.

name: Quickdraw
description: This weapon can be drawn unbelievably fast.

name: Solar Resistance
description: Reduces incoming Solar damage from combatants.

name: Trace Rifle Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Trace Rifle ammo you can carry.

name: Unquenchable Thirst
description: Increases the buff effect of the To Excess Origin Trait and the healing effect of the Souldrinker Origin Trait.

name: Impact Absorber
description: Increases this armor's resilience, allowing you to absorb more damage.

name: Ensign Entrance
description: Adds an ensign appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Blessing of the Sky
description: Using a Noble Round on an ally heals them and grants both you and them a weapon damage bonus for a short duration.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Tex Balanced Stock
description: Damaging targets while firing from the hip increases handling, reload speed, and movement speed for an improved amount while aiming down sights.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Suros Harmony
description: Reloading a weapon grants it a bonus to handling and reduces incoming flinch for a short time. Weapons with the SUROS Synergy Origin Trait are granted increased range instead.

name: Fanfare
description: Gain increased reload speed for the bottom half of your equipped weapon's magazine.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

description: +5 Class ▲ / -5 Weapons ▼

name: Nessus Scanner
description: Chance to obtain additional faction consumables on Nessus.

Collecting ammo loads this weapon from reserves and enhances its damage and reload speed for an improved duration.

Collecting Heavy ammo grants more time.

description: Improves weapon handling for equipped Energy weapon.

name: Special Ammo Scout
description: When you fill your Special ammo meter, it also creates smaller bricks of Special ammo for your allies.

name: Cruel Remedy

description: Rapid Arc weapon final blows create an Orb of Power.

description: Landing consecutive hits with a Sword you are wielding disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption]  Overload Champions. Additionally, Swords are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Enhanced Impact
description: +10 Impact

name: Mad Scientist
description: Shoots a long volley of rockets.

name: Icing-Breaker

name: Scout Rifle Scavenger

name: Prosperity (Vanguard)

name: Aeon Energy

name: Arc Impact Accelerator
description:
Arc melee abilities recharge faster.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

name: The Roadborn
description: Precision final blows and rapid precision hits briefly grant bonus handling, range, rate of fire, and precision damage with this weapon.

name: Thresh
description: Defeating combatants with this weapon generates an improved small amount of Super energy.

name: Major Resist
description: Gain extra damage resistance against powerful combatants.

name: Solo Operative

name: Energy Accelerant

name: Weakened Clear

name: Monochromatic Maestro
description: Dealing damage with elemental abilities grants increased damage to weapons of the same element for a short duration. Dealing damage with elemental weapons grants increased damage to abilities of the same element for a short duration.

name: Passive Aggressive Guard

name: Reversal
description: Dealing damage to Void debuffed targets increases this weapon's damage for a short time per each type of Void debuff affecting the target.

name: Bountiful Munitions
description: While Adrenal Rush is active, final blows grant Special Ammo progress. Final Blows against powerful combatants, Guardians, and Taken grants additional progress.

name: Adrenal Rush
description: Sprinting for a short time grants a period of improved reload speed and handling. Final blows extend this period.

name: Ember of Singeing
description: Your class ability recharges faster when you scorch targets.

name: Flash Counter
description: Blocking damage after raising your guard emits a short-range blast that disorients targets.

name: Solar Siphon
description: Rapid Solar weapon final blows create an Orb of Power.

name: Vexadecimal
description: Sustained fire weakens targets. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Boon of Friendship
description:
Grants a Dawning reward to your fireteam upon completion of an Ops activity, with additional rewards based on the number of teammates with Boons active.

Effect lasts until a reward is earned. Only one Boon of Friendship may be active per fireteam member.

name: Vampire's Caress
description: Melee kills restore health for a short duration.

name: Helium Spirals
description: Solar grenades burn longer. Melee kills restore them.

name: Warlord's Sigil
description: Melee and finisher final blows increase melee damage.

name: Chaos Accelerant
description:
[Grenade]  : Overcharge your grenade, making it deadlier and more effective.

Vortex Grenade: Increases the size, linger duration, and pull of the vortex.

Axion Bolt: Detonates twice and has enhanced seekers.

Scatter Grenade: Submunitions track to nearby targets.

Magnetic Grenade, Spike Grenade, Voidwall Grenade, and Suppressor Grenade: Releases a short-range Void blast. Cooldown is reduced.

Grants an additional grenade charge.

name: Heat Rises
description:
You can fire weapons, melee, and throw grenades while gliding.

[Grenade]  : Hold to consume your grenade, gaining Heat Rises and releasing a burst of healing energy that cures nearby allies. The strength of the burst is increased when a Healing Grenade is consumed.

Final blows while airborne increase the duration of Heat Rises and grant melee energy.

name: Psychohack
description:
Sustained damage from this weapon exhausts the target for a short duration.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

name: Accelerated Assault
description: Dealing sustained damage with this weapon loads a small amount of ammo from reserves, or removes heat, and slightly increases damage.

name: Insulation
description: Reduces class ability cooldown each time you pick up an Orb of Power.

name: Stalker's Entrance
description: Adds a hunting crest appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Weft Cutter

name: Lucent Blades

name: Io Scout Reports
description: A member of your fireteam has used a Scout Report, which highlights nearby loot catches on Io for all members of the fireteam.

name: Adept Big Ones Spec
description: Deals extra damage against powerful combatants, bosses, and vehicles.

name: Fragment Magnet
description: Increased chance to find Solstice Key Fragments.

name: Nightmarish Resilience
description: When you have Unstable Essence, rapid weapon damage or final blows heal you and begin health regeneration.

name: Nightmarish Power
description: Final blows to a challenging combatant or higher-ranked target grant Unstable Essence. When you have Unstable Essence, you receive grenade and melee stat bonuses.

name: Sidearm Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Sidearms.

name: Elemental Fury
description: While stunned, Champions take bonus damage from your abilities and Elemental Orb damage.

name: Communal Pickups
description: When an ally destroys or picks up your Tangle or Elemental Orb, the Tangle cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds and you gain bonus damage with weapons matching your subclass for 10 seconds.

name: Overload Machine Guns
description:
Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Machine Guns grants bullets that stun combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Refreshing Pickups
description: Picking up a Tangle or Elemental Orb grants energy to your least-powered ability.

name: Semi-Auto Striker

name: Vorpal Weapon
description: Increased damage against bosses, vehicles, and Guardians with their Super active. Stability is improved. Swords have improved guard resistance.

name: Ursine Guard
description: Improves Sentinel Shield and Unbreakable.

name: Ossified Entrance
description: Adds a bone spiral appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Heartbreaking Entrance
description: Adds a heartbreaking appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Chill Clip

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Elemental Shards
description: Collecting a Stasis shard grants energy to your least-charged ability.

name: Underdog

name: Redirection
description: Damaging rank-and-file combatants increases damage against more powerful ones. Powerful shots consume fewer stacks.

name: String of Curses
description: Kills refill the magazine, increase damage, and grant Super energy.

name: Nessus Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 30-meter range while on Nessus.

name: Deprecated Perk

description: Improves Sol Invictus and Sunspots.

name: Whisper of Hedrons
description: Increases weapon handling and health after freezing a target with [Stasis] Stasis.

name: Snapshot Sights
description: Faster time to aim down sights.

name: Rapid Repair
description: When your shields begin to regenerate, you gain flinch resistance and damage resistance for a short time.

name: Built from Scratch
description: While your reserves are low, combatant final blows with weapons provide additional ammo progress based on their ammo type.  Primary ammo weapons boost Special ammo progress, and Special ammo weapons boost Heavy ammo progress.

name: Dual Speed Receiver
description: When aiming down sights, weapon rate of fire slows while weapon damage increases. Final blows while aiming down sights grant bonus Heavy ammo progress. [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap to Spinning Up.

name: Submachine Gun Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Primary ammo while you have a Submachine Gun equipped.

name: Ranged Weapon
description: Throw your Praxic Blade to hit multiple targets. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Hipfired shots track targets.

name: Purple Beam
description: Adds a purple beam to your transmat effects.

name: Remote Detonation
description:
Grenades bounce.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

name: Ember of Beams
description: Your Solar Super projectiles have stronger target acquisition.

name: Strangest Favor
description: Grants extra Strange Coins when completing Vanguard Ops or Onslaught activities, or also for winning Crucible or Gambit matches. Rewards increase with additional stacks.

name: Stranger Favor
description: Grants extra Strange Coins when completing Vanguard Ops or Onslaught activities, or also for winning Crucible or Gambit matches. Rewards increase with additional stacks.

name: Strange Favor
description: Grants extra Strange Coins when completing Vanguard Ops or Onslaught activities, or also for winning Crucible or Gambit matches. Rewards increase with additional stacks.

name: Exhaustive Research
description: Aiming down sights at a target for a short time loads a homing micro-missile.

name: Void Ability Module
description:
Class abilities recharge faster when using a Void subclass.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

name: Spirit of Synthoceps
description: Improves melee damage when you're surrounded.

name: Spirit of Verity
description: Weapon final blows grant grenade damage.

name: Spirit of the Assassin
description: Finishers and powered melee final blows grant invisibility.

name: Spirit of Inmost Light
description: Using an ability empowers the other two abilities.

name: Spirit of the Ophidian
description: Weapons ready very quickly.

name: Spirit of the Star-Eater
description: Orbs of Power overcharge your Super.

name: Touch of Malice
description: Final round drains life force to deal extra damage.

name: Ardent Adoration
description: This visual effect is suppressed while in combat.

name: Facet of Dawn
description: Powered melee hits against targets makes you radiant. Powered melee final blows make you and nearby allies radiant.

name: Overload Auto Rifle
description:
Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Auto Rifles grants bullets that stun combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Additionally, Auto Rifles are always overcharged when this modifier is active.

name: Anti-Barrier Sniper Rifle
description:
Sniper Rifles you are wielding fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Additionally, Sniper Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Anti-barrier Submachine Gun
description:
Submachine Guns you are wielding fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Additionally, Submachine Guns are always overcharged when the modifier is active.

name: Overload Hand Cannon
description:
Landing consecutive hits with any Hand Cannon you are wielding disrupts combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. 

Additionally, Hand Cannons are always overcharged when the modifier is active.

name: Unstoppable Scout Rifle
description: Aiming down the sights of a Scout Rifle for a short time loads a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions. Additionally, Scout Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Unstoppable Sidearm
description:
Aiming down the sights of a Sidearm for a short time loads a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Additionally, Sidearms are always overcharged when the modifier is active.

name: Anti-Barrier Pulse Rifle
description: Your equipped Pulse Rifles fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. Additionally, Pulse Rifles are always overcharged when that modifier is active.

name: Amassed Fate

name: Frozen Ordnance

name: Penance

name: Taken Invigoration

Defeating a challenging Taken combatant refreshes your class ability.

This mod's abilities cannot stack across multiple copies.

name: Purple Spotlight
description: Adds a purple spotlight to your transmat effects.

name: Venture Capital

name: Pink Class Sigil
description: Adds a pink class sigil to your transmat effects.

name: Recycled Energy
description: Reloading after defeating targets grants energy to your lowest charged ability.

name: Nova Bomb

name: Magnificent Howl
description: The number of precision final blows before reloading affects the total rounds granted with increased range and damage. Precision final blows with Magnificent Howl active extend the effect for additional rounds. Improves reload.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Silver Spotlight
description: Adds a silver spotlight to your transmat effects.

name: Glacial Fortification

name: Bow Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chances of finding Heavy ammo while you have a Bow equipped that uses Heavy ammo.

name: Tenacious Handle

name: Mercury Glimmer Scavenger

name: Thread of Generation
description: Dealing damage generates grenade energy.

name: Shadow Legion Entrance
description: Adds a Shadow Legion drop pod apperance to your transmat effects.

name: Lattice Entrance

name: Thin the Herd

name: Focused Fury

name: Flow State
description:
Defeating a jolted target makes you amplified.

While you are amplified, your dodge recharges more quickly, you are more resilient while dodging, and your reload speed is greatly increased.

name: Rapid-Fire Frame
description: Fires full auto with deeper ammo reserves. Faster reload when weapon is empty.

name: Scavenger: Cabal
description: Improves rewards from eliminating Cabal enemies.

name: Color Variants
description: This transmat effect may be awarded in silver, gold, green, pink, or blue color variants.

name: Sniper Rifle Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Sniper Rifle ammo you can carry.

name: Blessing of Order
description: Rifts create beneficial seeker projectiles.

name: Threat Detector
description: Greatly increased reload, stability, and handling when targets are in close proximity.

name: Arc Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Arc weapons.

name: Unflinching Glaive Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Glaives.

name: Head Rush
description: Sliding or standing up after crouching for a short time grants this weapon a brief period of bonus handling, reload speed, and damage against Hive combatants.

name: Lucent Blade
description: While Charged with Light, dealing damage with a Sword gives you bonus Sword damage for 5 seconds, consuming one stack of Charged with Light.

name: EDZ Resource Detector
description: Detect resources within a 30-meter range while in the EDZ.

name: Cascade Point
description: Final blows or sustained precision hits with another weapon increase this weapon's rate of fire for a short duration.

name: Glorious Charge
description: Increases Thundercrash damage.

name: Dark Ether Reaper
description:
