name: Techeun's Foresight
description: After collecting a Void breach, your next final blow with a Void weapon triggers a detonation. The detonation is more powerful if it is triggered quickly after collecting a Void breach.

name: Gift of the Ley Lines
description: Rapidly defeating combatants with Void energy spawns a Void breach.

name: High Priority
description: Improves Trace Rifles.

name: Stat Penalty
description: -10 Recovery

name: Unflinching Hand Cannon Aim
description: Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Hand Cannons.

name: [Aim Down Sights] : Dash forward with a damaging Arc effect.
description: [Aim Down Sights] : Dash forward with a damaging Arc effect.

name: Vernier Thrusters
description: [Dodge Left] , [Dodge Right]  : Quick lateral movements.

name: Adept Draw Time
description: +10 Draw Time

name: Cosmology
description: Kills with this weapon cause enemy targets to detonate and spawn Void projectiles that track targets.

name: Harsh Truths
description: 5-round burst. Heals on ally death.

name: Master of Arms
description: Final blows with any weapon improve this weapon's damage for an improved duration.

name: Enhanced Cheer
description: You are using Enhanced Cheer to earn Dawning Essence at an increased rate. Your fireteam has an elevated chance of receiving additional Dawning Essence upon activity completion.

name: Synergy
description: Final blows with this weapon have a greater chance to create an Elemental pickup matching its damage type, or an Orb of Power for weapons that deal Kinetic damage damage.

name: Spectral Blades
description:
Summon a pair of deadly Void blades and stalk the battlefield in a veil of shadows.
[Light Attack]  : Perform a quick melee attack.
[Heavy Attack]  : Perform a heavy attack and once again vanish from sight.

name: Class Font
description: You gain a bonus to your class stat while you have any Armor Charge. Your Armor Charge decays over time.

name: +5 Melee ▲
description: +5 Melee ▲

name: +3 Melee ▲
description: +3 Melee ▲

name: Emergency Reinforcement
description:
When your shields become broken, you gain temporary damage reduction.

Consumes 3 or more stacks of Armor Charge, granting a longer duration to the damage reduction for each charge consumed.

name: Pulse Rifle Scavenger
description: Pulse Rifles get bonus reserves when you pick up ammo.

name: Sniper Rifle Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding ammo while you have a Sniper Rifle equipped.

name: Sidearm Reserves
description: Increases the amount of Sidearm ammo you can carry.

name: One-Two Finisher
description:
Finishers restore melee abilities.

Consumes 3 or more stacks of Armor Charge, granting additional energy for each charge consumed.

name: Network Upload
description: Weapon final blows grant the wearer and nearby allies melee energy.

name: Network Admin
description:
Being near allies creates a relay network that gives the wearer improved handling and reload speed. 

Being near other allied Network Admins additionally grants the wearer a bonus to Health stat.

name: Archer's Tempo
description: Draw time substantially decreases after every precision hit for a longer duration.

name: Well of Tenacity
description: Picking up a Void elemental well reduces the damage you take from combatants for a short period of time.

name: Bring the Heat
description: Improved Fusion Grenades.

name: Burning Fists
description: Melee kills increase melee damage.

name: Explosive Finisher
description:
Finishers restore grenades. 

Consumes 3 or more stacks of Armor Charge, granting additional energy for each charge consumed.

name: Osmosis
description: Using your grenade ability partially refills the magazine and changes this weapon's damage type to match your grenade until you stow it. Handling is improved.

name: Kickstart
description: Gain bonus damage and charge rate during a slide after sprinting for a short duration.

name: Tap the Trigger
description: Grants an improved short period of greatly increased stability and accuracy on initial trigger pull.

name: Solar Rampart
description: Solar kills recharge a Solar blast Barricade.

name: Demolitionist
description: Kills with this weapon generate grenade energy. Activating your grenade ability reloads this weapon from reserves.

name: Howling Blizzard
description: Adds a winter storm to your transmat effects.

name: Shower of Gifts
description: Adds an explosion of generosity to your transmat effects.

name: Radiant Light
description: Casting your Super causes nearby allies with at least one Armor Charge to gain an additional one. Allies that have a different Super element than you gain an additional Armor Charge.

name: Enhanced Resistant Tether
description: Gain powerful damage resistance while part of a tether chain. Multiple copies of this mod stack to increase this benefit.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Outlaw
description: Precision kills greatly decrease reload time.

name: Solar Ordnance Charger
description:
Grenades recharge faster when using a Solar subclass.
  •  Stacks up to 3 times

name: Full Auto Trigger System
description: Holding down the trigger will fire this weapon at full auto. Increases stability.

name: Desperate Measures
description: Weapon final blows grant bonus damage. Melee and grenade final blows grant a larger damage bonus that can stack.

name: Temporal Adapter
description: Readying this weapon grants it bonus stability, handling, and reload speed for an improved duration that is borrowed from an alternate timeline version of the weapon. Swords gain bonus charge rate and guard resistance.

name: Another Dimension
description: Reduces the activation time of Tesseract.

name: Flying Monster
description: While you are airborne, sustained damage and final blows with this weapon to difficult combatants grant a Void overshield, reduce combatant accuracy, and return ammo to the magazine.

name: Enduring Wells
description: Increases the lifespan of elemental wells you create. Multiple copies of this mod stack, further extending the lifespan.

name: Well of Utility
description: Picking up a Void elemental well grants you additional class ability energy. Multiple copies of this mod increase this effect.

name: Reaper
description: Shortly after using your class ability, your next weapon final blow spawns an Orb of Power.

name: Fourth Time's the Charm
description: Rapidly landing precision hits will return two rounds to the magazine.

name: One with the Void
description: Improves duration, damage, and durability of Void Souls.

name: Horde Shuttle
description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a threadling.

name: Hail The Storm
description:
Shattering frozen targets and Stasis crystals deals increased damage.

Shattering Stasis crystals releases shards of ice that damage and slow targets.

name: Rays of Precision
description: While radiant, Solar precision final blows cause combatants to ignite.

name: Solo Operative
description: While you are the only member of your fireteam, precision weapon final blows increase weapon damage until you are defeated.

name: Argent Ordnance
description: Firing a Rocket Launcher consumes one stack of Armor Charge, granting increased damage and reload speed until you reload or stow your Rocket Launcher.

name: Precision Frame
description: Fires small auto-tracking rockets.

name: Font of Might
description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants a temporary strong bonus to weapon damage of the same elemental type as your subclass.

name: Photoinhibition
description: This weapon deals bonus damage to combatant shields and targets with overshields. Breaking a combatant's shield disorients them; breaking an energy-matched shield also disorients nearby combatants.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Dreaming City Experience Log
description: Gain 10% more XP while in the Dreaming City.

name: Depths of Duskfield
description: Duskfield grenades have a larger effect and reduce the damage that allies take.

name: Myrmidon's Reach
description: Improves your Shield Throw melee.

name: Harbinger Seethe
description: After activating Harbinger's Pulse multiple times, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to cause a rain of projectiles on your next direct hit with this weapon.

name: Enhanced Unflinching Fusion Rifle Aim
description: Greatly reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming Fusion Rifles.

name: Calm Amidst Chaos
description: After not taking damage for a short duration, this weapon gains significantly increased aim down sight speed, handling and flinch resistance until the next shot is fired. Activates faster.

name: Echo of Domineering
description:
After suppressing a target, you gain increased weapon stat for a short duration, and your equipped weapon is reloaded from reserves.

Defeating suppressed targets creates a Void Breach.

name: Sundering Blast
description: Stunning a Champion creates an explosive blast.

name: Sandcastle Effects
description: Adds the illusion of a sandcastle to your transmat effects.

name: Beach Ball Effects
description: Adds the illusion of a beach ball to your transmat effects.

name: Improved Nessus Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 40-meter range while on Nessus.

name: Self-Repairing Nanofibers
description: Increases this armor's recovery, allowing you to recover health faster.

name: Watchtower
description: Precision final blows while aiming down sights grant damage resistance until you stop aiming down sights.

name: Field Expertise
description:
Precision final blows with any weapon grant a stacking bonus to reload speed, target acquisition, and weapon damage against non-boss combatants for a short duration.

Weapon final blows with non-precision direct hits end this effect early.

name: Void Ammo Generation
description: Increases the ammo generation of Void weapons.

name: Right Hook
description:
Dealing melee damage gives this weapon increased target acquisition and range for a short period of time.
Dealing melee damage again extends the effect.

name: Font of Might
description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants a temporary strong bonus to weapon damage of the same elemental type as your subclass.

name: Gift Stack Entrance
description: Adds a tower of presents to your transmat effects.

name: Nessus Scout Reports
description: Highlights nearby loot caches on Nessus for you and your fireteam.

name: Rage of the Warmind
description: Adds additional Solar damage to the explosions of Warmind Cells you destroy.

name: Corrupted Nucleosynthesis
description: Enrages when dealing or sustaining damage.

name: Vanguard Determination
description: After using your class ability, final blows with this weapon grant you bonus damage resistance.

name: Burning Souls
description: [Solar]Solar final blows grant Burning Souls. Dodge applies Cure.

name: Wrath of the Colossus
description: Fully automatic, slow-firing slug launcher with a charge time.

name: SUROS Legacy
description: Half mag bonus damage and regens health.

name: Cauterizing Flame
description: Create a Sunspot when critically wounded or on Barricade cast.

name: Temporal Loader
description: This weapon loads an increased amount of ammo from reserves when dealing damage to targets that are slowed, frozen, or suspended.

name: +5 Grenade ▲
description: +5 Grenade ▲

name: +3 Grenade ▲
description: +3 Grenade ▲

name: Arc Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Arc weapons over time.

name: Bottomless Bounty II
description: Improves the effect of the Soul Drinker and Hot Swap weapon Origin perks.

name: Machine Gun Scavenger
description: Machine Guns get bonus reserves when you pick up ammo.

name: Glaive Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Glaives.

name: Focusing Strike
description: Grants class ability energy when you cause damage with a powered melee attack.

name: Release the Wolves
description: When firing from the hip, this weapon shoots in full auto and damage and rate of fire are increased, but accuracy and range are decreased.

name: Runneth Over
description: Reloading near allies overflows the magazine. Bows receive faster draw time and Swords receive faster charge rate.

name: Lagrangian Sight
description: Targeting system

name: Explosive Light
description: Picking up an Orb of Power increases the next projectile's blast radius and damage.

name: Fusion Rifle Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Fusion Rifles.

name: Traveler's Sublimation
description: Rapidly defeating combatants with Stasis weapons creates a Stasis mine that damages and freezes nearby combatants.

name: Squad Goals
description:
Performing a finisher while you are amplified grants Amplified to nearby allies. 

Performing a finisher while you have Woven Mail grants Woven Mail to nearby allies. 

Performing a finisher while you have Devour grants Devour to nearby allies.

name: Lightning Strikes Twice
description: After throwing an Arc grenade, gain increased grenade recharge for a short time. Arc final blows extend the duration of this benefit.

name: Shock and Awe
description: Arc final blows while you are amplified summon a burst of lightning that damages and jolts targets.

name: Supernova
description: Picking up a Void Breach causes your next source of Void damage to create a large weakening pulse.

name: Conductive Cosmic Needle
description: Targets affected by Strand debuffs take increased damage from Arc and Void abilities.

name: Soaring Fusilier
description: Air dodge reloads weapons. Fusion Rifle and Linear Fusion Rifle final blows make you radiant.

name: Gift Giver
description:
Thanks to you, all players will receive a gift upon completing this activity.

No gifts will be awarded if you leave the activity early.

name: Bow Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chances of finding Heavy ammo while you have a Bow equipped that uses Heavy ammo.

name: Air Brakes
description: [Brake]  : Brake and corner more aggressively.

name: Heal Clip
description: Reloading after dealing a final blow grants Cure to you and your nearby allies. You have additional time to perform the reload.

name: Aura of Leadership
description: Applies a gold crown aura.

name: Proximity Power
description: When targets are nearby, final blows grant an improved amount of bonus Melee stat.

name: Elemental Siphon
description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super.

name: Creeping Chill
description: Stasis final blows against slowed or frozen targets release a burst that slows combatants and grants Frost Armor to allies caught in the blast.

name: Threaded Blast
description: Destroying a Tangle with a Strand weapon creates a larger and more damaging explosion.

name: Press The Advantage
description: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

name: Sustained Fire
description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

name: Incendiary Rifle Rounds
description: Solar Sniper Rifle precision hits scorch targets.

name: New Tricks
description: Improved Skip Grenade.

name: Abyssal Charge
description: Become Charged with Light by defeating combatants with Void melee abilities.

name: Shotgun Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Shotguns over time. Multiple copies of this perk stack to reduce the time taken to fully reload.

name: Nightmarish Opulence
description: Increases the duration of the Psychohack Origin Trait and the effect of the Extrovert Origin Trait.

name: Trace Rifle Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Special ammo while you have a Trace Rifle equipped.

name: Sidearm Holster
description: Gradually reloads your stowed Sidearms over time. Multiple copies of this perk stack to reduce the time taken to fully reload.

name: Pulse Rifle Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Pulse Rifles.

name: Momentum Transfer
description: Causing damage with a grenade reduces your melee cooldown.

name: Iron Gaze
description: Massively improves weapon target acquisition at the cost of weapon range.

name: Ensemble
description: Improved handling and reload speed when allies are nearby.

name: Resolute
description: Improved Fist of Havoc. Arc final blows grant a weapon damage bonus.

name: Gear Shift
description: Reloading after a final blow or becoming amplified grants a period of increased damage. Stacks 5x.

name: Calculated Balance
description: While in full auto mode, final blows or rapid hits with this weapon grant bonus damage, accuracy, and stability for a short duration.

name: Bait and Switch
description: Deal damage with all equipped weapons within a short time to give this weapon a damage boost for an improved duration.

name: Colossal Quiver
description: Maximizes quiver size.

name: Collective Demolition
description:
Collecting an Elemental pickup or destroying a Tangle grants this weapon a stacking period of grenade energy generation on hit. Throwing a Tangle provides additional time.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

name: Hidden Hand
description: Better target acquisition.

name: Banshee's Favorite
description: Generate Gunsmith telemetry data on any elemental weapon kills at an increased rate.

name: Void Battery
description: Activating Void class abilities grants an overshield. Increases cooldown of your class ability.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Rocket Launcher Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Heavy ammo while you have a Rocket Launcher equipped.

name: Melee Forged
description: +3 Melee

name: Rapid Hit
description: Rapid precision hits temporarily increase stability and reload speed.

name: Facet of Balance
description: Rapidly defeating targets with Light damage grants melee energy. Rapidly defeating targets with Darkness damage grants grenade energy.

name: Thread of Binding
description: Super final blows emit a suspending burst from the target.

name: Facet of Solitude
description: Landing rapid precision hits emits a severing blast from the target. While transcendent, the severing blast is bigger.

name: Mercury Cache Detector
description: Detect caches within a 30-meter range while on Mercury.

name: Unstoppable Melee
description: Arc melee abilities stagger unshielded combatants. Strong against Unstoppable Champions.

name: Dreaming Shimmer
description: Adds an Awoken pointillistic appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Cannon Fodder
description: Adds a cannon appearance to your transmat effects.

name: Silkbound Slayer
description: This weapon deals bonus damage to suspended targets. Gain faster draw time for a short duration when you suspend a target from any source or damage a suspended target with this weapon.

name: Energy Accelerant
description: Your Dragonfly, Chain Reaction, and Firefly explosions deal more damage.

name: Abundant Ammo
description: Grants slightly increased ammo generation.

name: Font of Might
description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants a temporary strong bonus to weapon damage of the same elemental type as your subclass.

name: +10 Grenade ▲
description: +10 Grenade ▲

name: Spark of Amplitude
description: Rapidly defeating targets while you are amplified creates an Orb of Power.

name: Unstoppable Burst
description: Aiming down sights loads a high-impact burst that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger]  Unstoppable Champions.

name: Enhanced Voltaic Ammo Collector
description: Greatly increases the chances of finding Heavy ammo while you have the Voltaic Overflow buff. Multiple copies of this mod stack to increase this benefit.

name: Guardian Blue
description: Adds a blue Guardian crest to your transmat effects.

name: Core Hound
description: Completing a clan vendor challenge awards Enhancement Cores.

name: Particle Deconstruction
description: Dealing damage to a combatant with a Fusion Rifle or Linear Fusion Rifle grants bonus damage with a Fusion Rifle or Linear Fusion Rifle against that combatant for a short duration. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

name: Scout Rifle Ammo Finder
description: Increases your chance of finding Primary ammo while you have a Scout Rifle equipped.

name: Glaive Loader
description: Increases reload speed of Glaives.

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Dual Speed Receiver
description: When aiming down sights, weapon rate of fire slows while weapon damage increases. Final blows while aiming down sights grant bonus Heavy ammo progress. [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap to Spinning Up.

name: Machine Gun Targeting
description: Improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim down sights speed for Machine Guns.

name: +5 Grenade ▲ / -5 Melee ▼
description: +5 Grenade ▲ / -5 Melee ▼

name: Deprecated Perk
description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

name: Kill Clip
description: Reloading after defeating a target grants increased damage for an improved duration.

name: Enhanced Fusion Rifle Targeting
description: Greatly improved target acquisition, accuracy, and aim-down-sights speed for Fusion Rifles.

name: Spark of Intellect
description: Spark of Intellect

name: More Wolves
description: Increases magazine size. Final blows with Wolfpack Rounds spawn a faster, more powerful micro-missile at the target's location.

name: Radiolaria Transposer
description: Rapid final blows cause targets to explode into a pool of radiolarian fluid. Duration of pool is increased.

name: Silver Dawning Lantern
description: Adds a silver Dawning lantern to your transmat effects.

name: Unwound
description: Sustained damage spawns Threadlings.

name: Thread of Isolation
description: Landing rapid precision hits emits a severing burst from the target.

name: Scoot to Loot
description: Sliding collects nearby ammo and temporarily grants enhanced reload speed and handling to your weapons.

name: Shoot to Scoot
description: Dealing damage with your weapons temporarily grants enhanced sliding. Sliding provides damage resistance.

name: Stunning Recovery
description: Stunning a Champion further refills your magazine, triggers health regeneration, and further improves recovery for a short duration.

name: Machine Gun Dexterity
description: Faster ready and stow speed for Machine Guns.

name: Killing Tally
description: Kills increase this weapon's damage until it is stowed or reloaded.

name: Restoration Ritual
description: Reviving allies or defeating combatants with finishers reloads this weapon and readies an emergency ammo refill for the next time this weapon runs out of ammo.

name: Retinal Burn
description: Rapid [Arc] Arc weapon precision hits consume an Armor Charge to trigger a blinding burst at the target's location.

name: Weakened Clear
description: When using a Grenade Launcher, damaging a boss, damaging a Champion, or breaking a combatant's shield reloads your stowed weapons and weakens the combatant.

name: Void Renewal
description:
While Devour is active, [Void] Void weapon final blows have a chance to generate a Void Breach.

Picking up a Void Breach increases weapon reload and handling; Shotguns and Grenade Launchers are also reloaded from reserves.

name: Curative Orbs
description:
The first time you break a target's shield or break the shield of a Guardian using their Super, you create an Orb of Power.

Collecting an Elemental pickup, collecting an Orb of Power, or destroying a Tangle grants you a small amount of health.

name: Frost Renewal
description: While you have Frost Armor, taking critical damage releases a burst that freezes nearby combatants and grants Frost Armor to you and nearby allies.

name: Debilitating Wave
description:
Finishers emit a damaging wave that matches the element of your currently equipped Super.

Arc, Void, and Stasis waves apply Blind, Weaken, and Slow respectively.

name: Hail The Storm
description: Shattering [Stasis] Stasis crystals releases shards of ice that damage and slow targets.

name: Full Court
description: Increases detonation damage as the projectile travels farther before exploding. Increases blast radius.

name: Rolling Storm
description:
Final blows grant Bolt Charge.
While amplified, final blows grant additional Bolt Charge. 
Gain increased Bolt Charge stacks when you have none.

name: Lethal Weave
description: Defeating an unraveled combatant grants grenade ability energy. If you have max grenade energy, you are granted Special ammo meter progress instead.

name: License to Thrill
description: Activating your grenade or the Nanotech Tracer Missiles Origin Trait provides stacking resistance to incoming damage at point-blank range.

name: Gathering Light
description:
Final blows grant stacks.
[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Refresh abilities.

name: Forge's Kin
description: Black Armory weapon final blows briefly grant ammo generation, reload speed, and damage against combatants when the weapon is redrawn. Buff potency and duration increases for each equipped Black Armory weapon.

name: Built to Blast
description: Gain aim assist, stability, and flinch resistance while you have Woven Mail, Frost Armor, or Void Overshield.

name: Bullseye Bolster
description: Bullseye Bolster

name: Lead from Gold
description: Picking up Heavy ammo also grants increased ammo to this weapon.

name: Panic Response
description: Build up blight to fire Seekers.

name: Supercharged
description: With no augment, you gain a bonus to Resilience and Recovery, and your class ability recharges faster.

name: Rasputin's Wrath
description: Final blows with area-of-effect damage, Solar abilities, Seventh Seraph weapons, or IKELOS weapons grant Warmind Charges. Each stack of Warmind Charge increases your Weapons and Grenade stats.

name: Rasputin's Reprisal
description:
While you have Warmind Charges, defeating powerful combatants, destroying a construct, or destroying a Tangle releases a Solar detonation that damages combatants and heals allies.

Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.

name: Void Weapon Analyzer
description: Generate Gunsmith telemetry data on Void weapon kills.

name: Overload Rapid Fire
description:
Uninterrupted fire from your equipped Auto Rifles and Submachine Guns grants bullets that stun combatants, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

name: Time Dilation
description: Your decaying Armor Charge has a longer duration.

name: Null Factor
description: Withering Blade creates Stasis crystals.

name: Fiery Spirit
description: Adds a Solar sigil to your transmat effects.

name: Shot Swap
description: Final blows build and store charges which allow you to swap and stow this weapon at a faster rate.
